---
title: "Vector_Correlations"
author: "Tyler Audet"
date: "2024-11-24"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ashr)
library(data.table)
library(cowplot)
library(patchwork)
```

below is the Vector correlation functions

```{r}

PD <- function(x) { 
  sqrt(t(x)%*%x)}
#this function gives me the vector correlation and angle, and vector magnitude ratio, alpha, between two vectors.

# alpha of 1 means that vector 2 is the same length as vector 1. 
# lower than one means that vec1 has a smaller magnitude than vec2
# greater than 1 means that vec1 has a larger magnitude than vec2.

ang.vec.alph <- function(vec1, vec2) {
  vec1_c <- vec1 - mean(vec1)
  vec2_c <- vec2 - mean(vec2)
  vec.cor <- (t(vec1_c) %*% vec2_c)/(PD(vec1_c)*PD(vec2_c))
  vec.angle <- acos(vec.cor)*(180/pi)
  vec.alpha <- PD(vec1)/PD(vec2) # vectors not centered
  vec.alpha_c <- PD(vec1_c)/PD(vec2_c) # vectors centered
  
  vec.ED <- PD(vec2-vec1) #Subtract vector one from vector two and then calculate PD for Euclidean Distance. 
  ## Do not use vec.ED unless examining mean gene expr vectors. Specifically do not use for fold change
  return(c(vector.cor = vec.cor, vec.angle=vec.angle, vec.alpha = vec.alpha, vec.alpha_c = vec.alpha_c, vector.ED = vec.ED))} 


#The function below will generate two vectors of the same length as the experimental vectors provided to it with the argument 'sig_vec'
RandomVectorSampler <- function(vec1, vec2, sig_vec) {
  sig_vector_length <- length(sig_vec)
  
  random_index <- sample(1:length(vec1), size = sig_vector_length)
  sub_vec1 <- na.omit(vec1[random_index])
  sub_vec2 <- na.omit(vec2[random_index])
  
  ang.vec.alph(sub_vec1, sub_vec2)
}

comment(RandomVectorSampler) <- c("vec1 = vector of complete genelist comparison 1",
                                  "vec2 = vector of complete genelist comparison 2",
                                  "sig_vec = vector of significant genes, to get length")

```

First load the M-F contrasts

```{r}
dp <- fread("../../data/prolongata_norms")
dc <- fread("../../data/carrolli_norms")
dm <- fread("../../data/melanogaster_norms")
```

Vector correlation analysis

First thing I will do is get all of the subsets of the data for each species which will give me an estimate for every gene for each combination of values.

From ID, just looking at distributions of 
```{r}
blah <- abs(dp$UCL_log2 - dp$LCL_log2)
hist(blah)

quantile(blah, probs = c(0.5, 0.9, 0.95, 0.99, 0.999, 1))

length(blah)
sum(blah < 4)
sum(blah < 6)
```

I want to pull in the estimates without a contrast, extract the stage and leg specific estimates to find genes that should be filtered out when we extract subsets of our fixed effects below.

```{r}
mf_dp <- na.omit(fread("../../outputs/pro_separate.txt"))
mf_dm <- na.omit(fread("../../outputs/mel_separate.txt"))
mf_dc <- na.omit(fread("../../outputs/car_separate.txt"))

mf_dp <- mf_dp[,c(-1,-7,-8)]
mf_dm <- mf_dm[,c(-1,-7,-8)]
mf_dc <- mf_dc[,c(-1,-7,-8)]

colnames(mf_dp) <- c("gene", "sex", "leg", "stage", "estimate", "LCL", "UCL")
colnames(mf_dm) <- c("gene", "sex", "leg", "stage", "estimate", "LCL", "UCL")
colnames(mf_dc) <- c("gene", "sex", "leg", "stage", "estimate", "LCL", "UCL")

mf_dp$estimate_log2 <- log2(exp(mf_dp$estimate))
mf_dm$estimate_log2 <- log2(exp(mf_dm$estimate))
mf_dc$estimate_log2 <- log2(exp(mf_dc$estimate))

mf_dp$UCL_log2 <- log2(exp(mf_dp$UCL))
mf_dm$UCL_log2 <- log2(exp(mf_dm$UCL))
mf_dc$UCL_log2 <- log2(exp(mf_dc$UCL))

mf_dp$LCL_log2 <- log2(exp(mf_dp$LCL))
mf_dm$LCL_log2 <- log2(exp(mf_dm$LCL))
mf_dc$LCL_log2 <- log2(exp(mf_dc$LCL))

bad_genes <- unique(c(mf_dp[LCL_log2 <= 0]$gene, mf_dc[LCL_log2 <= 0]$gene, mf_dm[LCL_log2 <= 0]$gene))

```

Below I get the subsetted data.tables without the genes that have lower confidence limits below zero. These genes tend to have very very low expression and complete separation between the sexes, which causes very high variance and messes with the vector correlation and alphas
```{r}

master <- dp$gene[which(dp$gene %in% dc$gene & dp$gene %in% dm$gene)]

master <- master[-which(master %in% bad_genes)]

dp <- dp[dp$gene %in% master]
dc <- dc[dc$gene %in% master]
dm <- dm[dm$gene %in% master]

# get the subsetted data sets
dp_subset_for_late <- dp[leg == "for" & stage == "late"]
dp_subset_for_early <- dp[leg == "for" & stage == "early"]
dp_subset_mid_late <- dp[leg == "mid" & stage == "late"]
dp_subset_mid_early <- dp[leg == "mid" & stage == "early"]
#
dm_subset_for_late <- dm[leg == "for" & stage == "late"]
dm_subset_for_early <- dm[leg == "for" & stage == "early"]
dm_subset_mid_late <- dm[leg == "mid" & stage == "late"]
dm_subset_mid_early <- dm[leg == "mid" & stage == "early"]
#
dc_subset_for_late <- dc[leg == "for" & stage == "late"]
dc_subset_for_early <- dc[leg == "for" & stage == "early"]
dc_subset_mid_late <- dc[leg == "mid" & stage == "late"]
dc_subset_mid_early <- dc[leg == "mid" & stage == "early"]


# next I want to get the gene lists that I care about, I subset so the CI does not overlap a log2 change in either direction

genes_of_interest <- fread("../../paper/SupplementalFile1.csv")

male_genes <- as.character(genes_of_interest$gene[genes_of_interest$LCL > 0])

female_genes <- as.character(genes_of_interest$gene[genes_of_interest$LCL < 0])

genes_of_interest <- as.character(genes_of_interest$gene)



grn_targets <- read.table("../../outputs/grn_targetGenes.txt")

#dp_genes_for_late <- dp_subset_for_late$gene[dp_subset_for_late$LCL_log2 > 1 | dp_subset_for_late$UCL_log2 < -1]

#dp_genes_for_early <- dp_subset_for_early$gene[dp_subset_for_early$LCL_log2 > 1 | dp_subset_for_early$UCL_log2 < -1]

```

Below I will compare the vector correlation and magnitude of foreleg LF2 genes expression in foreleg vs midlegs within prolongata, carrolli, and melanogaster, for both the early stage and the late stage.

```{r}
# within D. prolongata, foreleg late vs midleg late correlations

# LF2 genes in the foreleg
dp_subset_for_late_VC <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% genes_of_interest),]

# 2LFC genes from the forelegs, but their expression in the midlegs
dp_subset_mid_late_VC <- dp_subset_mid_late[which(dp_subset_mid_late$gene %in% genes_of_interest),]

# vector correlation of the 2LFC foreleg late genes in foreleg vs. midleg
VC_dp_late_forVmid <- ang.vec.alph(dp_subset_for_late_VC$estimate_log2, dp_subset_mid_late_VC$estimate_log2)

dp_late_forVmid_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(
  # all of the foreleg LFC of genes that occur in both the foreleg and midleg ( should be all of them but I use this subsetting method for carry over when I compare between species where genes may not overlap perfectly)
  vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
  # vector of LFC genes for midleg
  vec2 = dp_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
  # vector that is the length of the vectors used for the correlations
  sig_vec = dp_subset_for_late_VC$estimate_log2)))

# whats the distribution of these random draws?
#hist(dp_late_forVmid_random[,1], breaks = 50)
#hist(dp_late_forVmid_random[,4], breaks = 50)
# There seems to be a strange peak at really high correlation that may be pulling the upper limit higher?

# 95% quantiles on the random 10000 permutations
dp_late_forVmid_random_quants <- quantile(dp_late_forVmid_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(dp_late_forVmid_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting
plotting_VC_dp_late_forVmid <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dp_late_forVmid,dp_late_forVmid_random_quants,dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata","Late")))

# within D. prolongata, foreleg early vs midleg early correlations

dp_subset_for_early_VC <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% genes_of_interest),]

dp_subset_mid_early_VC <- dp_subset_mid_early[which(dp_subset_mid_early$gene %in% genes_of_interest),]

# number of genes don't match because of the filtering of the high variance genes, so I filter down to match the lists

dp_early_forVmid <- ang.vec.alph(dp_subset_for_early_VC$estimate_log2, dp_subset_mid_early_VC$estimate_log2)

# lengths don't match again, need to figure out a way to fix this

#dp_subset_for_early_temp <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_subset_mid_early$gene)]

dp_early_forVmid_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(
  vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
  vec2 = dp_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
  sig_vec = dp_subset_for_early_VC$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dp_early_forVmid_random[,1], breaks = 50)

dp_early_for_random_quants <- quantile(dp_early_forVmid_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
dp_early_for_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(dp_early_forVmid_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_VC_dp_early_forVmid <- as.data.frame(t(c(dp_early_forVmid,dp_early_for_random_quants,dp_early_for_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata","Early")))
#

# within D. carrolli, foreleg late vs midleg late correlations

dc_subset_for_late_VC <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% genes_of_interest),]

dc_subset_mid_late_VC <- dc_subset_mid_late[which(dc_subset_mid_late$gene %in% genes_of_interest),]

VC_dc_late_forVmid <- ang.vec.alph(dc_subset_for_late_VC$estimate_log2, dc_subset_mid_late_VC$estimate_log2)

dc_late_forVmid_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(
  vec1 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
  vec2 = dc_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
  sig_vec = dc_subset_for_late_VC$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dc_late_forVmid_random[,1], breaks = 50)

dc_late_forVmid_random_quants <- quantile(dc_late_forVmid_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(dc_late_forVmid_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting

plotting_VC_dc_late_forVmid <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dc_late_forVmid,dc_late_forVmid_random_quants,dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli","Late")))
#



#

# within D. carrolli, foreleg early vs midleg early correlations

dc_subset_for_early_VC <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% genes_of_interest),]

dc_subset_mid_early_VC <- dc_subset_mid_early[which(dc_subset_mid_early$gene %in% genes_of_interest),]

dc_early_forVmid <- ang.vec.alph(dc_subset_for_early_VC$estimate_log2, dc_subset_mid_early_VC$estimate_log2)

# lengths don't match again, need to figure out a way to fix this

#dp_subset_for_early_temp <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_subset_mid_early$gene)]

dc_early_forVmid_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(
  vec1 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
  vec2 = dc_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
  sig_vec = dc_subset_for_early_VC$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dc_early_forVmid_random[,1], breaks = 50)

dc_early_for_random_quants <- quantile(dc_early_forVmid_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
dc_early_for_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(dc_early_forVmid_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

#

plotting_dc_early_for <- as.data.frame(t(c(dc_early_forVmid,dc_early_for_random_quants,dc_early_for_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli","Early")))

#



# within D. melanogaster, foreleg late vs midleg late correlations

dm_subset_for_late_VC <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% genes_of_interest),]

dm_subset_mid_late_VC <- dm_subset_mid_late[which(dm_subset_mid_late$gene %in% genes_of_interest),]

VC_dm_late_forVmid <- ang.vec.alph(dm_subset_for_late_VC$estimate_log2, dm_subset_mid_late_VC$estimate_log2)

dm_late_forVmid_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(
  vec1 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
  vec2 = dm_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
  sig_vec = dm_subset_for_late_VC$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dm_late_forVmid_random[,1], breaks = 50)

dm_late_forVmid_random_quants <- quantile(dm_late_forVmid_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(dm_late_forVmid_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting

plotting_VC_dm_late_forVmid <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dm_late_forVmid,dm_late_forVmid_random_quants,dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_alpha,"D. melanogaster","Late")))

#



#

# within D. melanogaster, foreleg early vs midleg early correlations

dm_subset_for_early_VC <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% genes_of_interest),]

dm_subset_mid_early_VC <- dm_subset_mid_early[which(dm_subset_mid_early$gene %in% genes_of_interest),]

dm_early_forVmid <- ang.vec.alph(dm_subset_for_early_VC$estimate_log2, dm_subset_mid_early_VC$estimate_log2)

# lengths don't match again, need to figure out a way to fix this

#dp_subset_for_early_temp <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_subset_mid_early$gene)]

dm_early_forVmid_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(
  vec1 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
  vec2 = dm_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
  sig_vec = dm_subset_for_early_VC$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dm_early_forVmid_random[,1], breaks = 50)

dm_early_for_random_quants <- quantile(dm_early_forVmid_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
dm_early_for_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(dm_early_forVmid_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

#

plotting_dm_early_for <- as.data.frame(t(c(dm_early_forVmid,dm_early_for_random_quants,dm_early_for_random_quants_alpha,"D. melanogaster","Early")))

#



# plot foreleg vs. midleg at both stages

temp <- as.data.frame(rbind(plotting_VC_dp_late_forVmid,plotting_VC_dp_early_forVmid,plotting_VC_dc_late_forVmid,plotting_dc_early_for,plotting_VC_dm_late_forVmid,plotting_dm_early_for))

colnames(temp) <- c("VC","Vangle","Alpha","alpha_c","ED","VC_LCL","VC_UCL","Alpha_LCL","Alpha_UCL","species","stage")

temp[1:9] <- sapply(temp[1:9], as.numeric)

for_mid_VC <- ggplot(temp, aes(x = stage, y = VC)) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~species) +
  ylim(-1,1) +
  ylab("Foreleg to midleg \nvector correlation") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = VC_LCL, ymax = VC_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  xlab(NULL) +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

for_mid_mag <- ggplot(temp, aes(x = stage, y = Alpha)) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~species) +
  ylab("Change in vector magnitude\n(foreleg/midleg)") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  #ylim(0,1) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = Alpha_LCL, ymax = Alpha_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

(for_mid_VC)/(for_mid_mag)

```

Male biased genes

```{r}
# within D. prolongata, foreleg late vs midleg late correlations

# LF2 genes in the foreleg
dp_subset_for_late_VC <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% male_genes),]

# 2LFC genes from the forelegs, but their expression in the midlegs
dp_subset_mid_late_VC <- dp_subset_mid_late[which(dp_subset_mid_late$gene %in% male_genes),]

# vector correlation of the 2LFC foreleg late genes in foreleg vs. midleg
VC_dp_late_forVmid <- ang.vec.alph(dp_subset_for_late_VC$estimate_log2, dp_subset_mid_late_VC$estimate_log2)

dp_late_forVmid_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(
  vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
  vec2 = dp_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
  sig_vec = dp_subset_for_late_VC$estimate_log2)))

# whats the distribution of these random draws?
#hist(dp_late_forVmid_random[,1], breaks = 50)
#hist(dp_late_forVmid_random[,4], breaks = 50)
# There seems to be a strange peak at really high correlation that may be pulling the upper limit higher?

# 95% quantiles on the random 10000 permutations
dp_late_forVmid_random_quants <- quantile(dp_late_forVmid_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(dp_late_forVmid_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting
plotting_VC_dp_late_forVmid <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dp_late_forVmid,dp_late_forVmid_random_quants,dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata","Late")))

#



#

# within D. prolongata, foreleg early vs midleg early correlations

dp_subset_for_early_VC <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% male_genes),]

dp_subset_mid_early_VC <- dp_subset_mid_early[which(dp_subset_mid_early$gene %in% male_genes),]

dp_early_forVmid <- ang.vec.alph(dp_subset_for_early_VC$estimate_log2, dp_subset_mid_early_VC$estimate_log2)

# lengths don't match again, need to figure out a way to fix this

#dp_subset_for_early_temp <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_subset_mid_early$gene)]

dp_early_forVmid_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(
  vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
  vec2 = dp_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
  sig_vec = dp_subset_for_early_VC$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dp_early_forVmid_random[,1], breaks = 50)

dp_early_for_random_quants <- quantile(dp_early_forVmid_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
dp_early_for_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(dp_early_forVmid_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_VC_dp_early_forVmid <- as.data.frame(t(c(dp_early_forVmid,dp_early_for_random_quants,dp_early_for_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata","Early")))
#
#
#

# within D. carrolli, foreleg late vs midleg late correlations

dc_subset_for_late_VC <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% male_genes),]

dc_subset_mid_late_VC <- dc_subset_mid_late[which(dc_subset_mid_late$gene %in% male_genes),]

VC_dc_late_forVmid <- ang.vec.alph(dc_subset_for_late_VC$estimate_log2, dc_subset_mid_late_VC$estimate_log2)

dc_late_forVmid_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(
  vec1 = dc_subset_for_late$PosteriorMea,
  vec2 = dc_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
  sig_vec = dc_subset_for_late_VC$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dc_late_forVmid_random[,1], breaks = 50)

dc_late_forVmid_random_quants <- quantile(dc_late_forVmid_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(dc_late_forVmid_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting

plotting_VC_dc_late_forVmid <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dc_late_forVmid,dc_late_forVmid_random_quants,dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli","Late")))


# within D. carrolli, foreleg early vs midleg early correlations

dc_subset_for_early_VC <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% male_genes),]

dc_subset_mid_early_VC <- dc_subset_mid_early[which(dc_subset_mid_early$gene %in% male_genes),]

dc_early_forVmid <- ang.vec.alph(dc_subset_for_early_VC$estimate_log2, dc_subset_mid_early_VC$estimate_log2)

# lengths don't match again, need to figure out a way to fix this

#dp_subset_for_early_temp <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_subset_mid_early$gene)]

dc_early_forVmid_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(
  vec1 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
  vec2 = dc_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
  sig_vec = dc_subset_for_early_VC$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dc_early_forVmid_random[,1], breaks = 50)

dc_early_for_random_quants <- quantile(dc_early_forVmid_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
dc_early_for_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(dc_early_forVmid_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

#

plotting_dc_early_for <- as.data.frame(t(c(dc_early_forVmid,dc_early_for_random_quants,dc_early_for_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli","Early")))

# within D. melanogaster, foreleg late vs midleg late correlations

dm_subset_for_late_VC <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% male_genes),]

dm_subset_mid_late_VC <- dm_subset_mid_late[which(dm_subset_mid_late$gene %in% male_genes),]

VC_dm_late_forVmid <- ang.vec.alph(dm_subset_for_late_VC$estimate_log2, dm_subset_mid_late_VC$estimate_log2)

dm_late_forVmid_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(
  vec1 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
  vec2 = dm_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
  sig_vec = dm_subset_for_late_VC$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dm_late_forVmid_random[,1], breaks = 50)

dm_late_forVmid_random_quants <- quantile(dm_late_forVmid_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(dm_late_forVmid_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting

plotting_VC_dm_late_forVmid <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dm_late_forVmid,dm_late_forVmid_random_quants,dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_alpha,"D. melanogaster","Late")))

# within D. melanogaster, foreleg early vs midleg early correlations

dm_subset_for_early_VC <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% male_genes),]

dm_subset_mid_early_VC <- dm_subset_mid_early[which(dm_subset_mid_early$gene %in% male_genes),]


dm_early_forVmid <- ang.vec.alph(dm_subset_for_early_VC$estimate_log2, dm_subset_mid_early_VC$estimate_log2)

dm_early_forVmid_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(
  vec1 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
  vec2 = dm_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
  sig_vec = dm_subset_for_early_VC$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dm_early_forVmid_random[,1], breaks = 50)

dm_early_for_random_quants <- quantile(dm_early_forVmid_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
dm_early_for_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(dm_early_forVmid_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

#

plotting_dm_early_for <- as.data.frame(t(c(dm_early_forVmid,dm_early_for_random_quants,dm_early_for_random_quants_alpha,"D. melanogaster","Early")))

# plot foreleg vs. midleg at both stages

temp <- as.data.frame(rbind(plotting_VC_dp_late_forVmid,plotting_VC_dp_early_forVmid,plotting_VC_dc_late_forVmid,plotting_dc_early_for,plotting_VC_dm_late_forVmid,plotting_dm_early_for))

colnames(temp) <- c("VC","Vangle","Alpha","alpha_c","ED","VC_LCL","VC_UCL","Alpha_LCL","Alpha_UCL","species","stage")

temp[1:9] <- sapply(temp[1:9], as.numeric)

for_mid_VC <- ggplot(temp, aes(x = stage, y = VC)) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~species) +
  ylim(-1,1) +
  ylab("Foreleg to midleg \nvector correlation") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = VC_LCL, ymax = VC_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  xlab(NULL) +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

for_mid_mag <- ggplot(temp, aes(x = stage, y = Alpha)) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~species) +
   ylab("Change in vector magnitude\n(foreleg/midleg)") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  #ylim(0,1) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = Alpha_LCL, ymax = Alpha_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

(for_mid_VC)/(for_mid_mag)

```

Female biased gene

```{r}
# within D. prolongata, foreleg late vs midleg late correlations

# LF2 genes in the foreleg
dp_subset_for_late_VC <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% female_genes),]

# 2LFC genes from the forelegs, but their expression in the midlegs
dp_subset_mid_late_VC <- dp_subset_mid_late[which(dp_subset_mid_late$gene %in% female_genes),]

# vector correlation of the 2LFC foreleg late genes in foreleg vs. midleg
VC_dp_late_forVmid <- ang.vec.alph(dp_subset_for_late_VC$estimate_log2, dp_subset_mid_late_VC$estimate_log2)

dp_late_forVmid_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(
  vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
  vec2 = dp_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
  sig_vec = dp_subset_for_late_VC$estimate_log2)))

# whats the distribution of these random draws?
#hist(dp_late_forVmid_random[,1], breaks = 50)
#hist(dp_late_forVmid_random[,4], breaks = 50)
# There seems to be a strange peak at really high correlation that may be pulling the upper limit higher?

# 95% quantiles on the random 10000 permutations
dp_late_forVmid_random_quants <- quantile(dp_late_forVmid_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(dp_late_forVmid_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting
plotting_VC_dp_late_forVmid <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dp_late_forVmid,dp_late_forVmid_random_quants,dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata","late")))

#



#

# within D. prolongata, foreleg early vs midleg early correlations

dp_subset_for_early_VC <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% female_genes),]

dp_subset_mid_early_VC <- dp_subset_mid_early[which(dp_subset_mid_early$gene %in% female_genes),]

dp_early_forVmid <- ang.vec.alph(dp_subset_for_early_VC$estimate_log2, dp_subset_mid_early_VC$estimate_log2)

# lengths don't match again, need to figure out a way to fix this

#dp_subset_for_early_temp <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_subset_mid_early$gene)]

dp_early_forVmid_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(
  vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
  vec2 = dp_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
  sig_vec = dp_subset_for_early_VC$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dp_early_forVmid_random[,1], breaks = 50)

dp_early_for_random_quants <- quantile(dp_early_forVmid_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
dp_early_for_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(dp_early_forVmid_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_VC_dp_early_forVmid <- as.data.frame(t(c(dp_early_forVmid,dp_early_for_random_quants,dp_early_for_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata","early")))
#
#
#

# within D. carrolli, foreleg late vs midleg late correlations

dc_subset_for_late_VC <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% female_genes),]

dc_subset_mid_late_VC <- dc_subset_mid_late[which(dc_subset_mid_late$gene %in% female_genes),]

VC_dc_late_forVmid <- ang.vec.alph(dc_subset_for_late_VC$estimate_log2, dc_subset_mid_late_VC$estimate_log2)

dc_late_forVmid_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(
  vec1 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
  vec2 = dc_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
  sig_vec = dc_subset_for_late_VC$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dc_late_forVmid_random[,1], breaks = 50)

dc_late_forVmid_random_quants <- quantile(dc_late_forVmid_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(dc_late_forVmid_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting

plotting_VC_dc_late_forVmid <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dc_late_forVmid,dc_late_forVmid_random_quants,dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli","late")))
#



#

# within D. carrolli, foreleg early vs midleg early correlations

dc_subset_for_early_VC <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% female_genes),]

dc_subset_mid_early_VC <- dc_subset_mid_early[which(dc_subset_mid_early$gene %in% female_genes),]

dc_early_forVmid <- ang.vec.alph(dc_subset_for_early_VC$estimate_log2, dc_subset_mid_early_VC$estimate_log2)

# lengths don't match again, need to figure out a way to fix this

#dp_subset_for_early_temp <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_subset_mid_early$gene)]

dc_early_forVmid_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(
  vec1 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
  vec2 = dc_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
  sig_vec = dc_subset_for_early_VC$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dc_early_forVmid_random[,1], breaks = 50)

dc_early_for_random_quants <- quantile(dc_early_forVmid_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
dc_early_for_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(dc_early_forVmid_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

#

plotting_dc_early_for <- as.data.frame(t(c(dc_early_forVmid,dc_early_for_random_quants,dc_early_for_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli","early")))

#



# within D. melanogaster, foreleg late vs midleg late correlations

dm_subset_for_late_VC <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% female_genes),]

dm_subset_mid_late_VC <- dm_subset_mid_late[which(dm_subset_mid_late$gene %in% female_genes),]

VC_dm_late_forVmid <- ang.vec.alph(dm_subset_for_late_VC$estimate_log2, dm_subset_mid_late_VC$estimate_log2)

dm_late_forVmid_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(
  vec1 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
  vec2 = dm_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
  sig_vec = dm_subset_for_late_VC$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dm_late_forVmid_random[,1], breaks = 50)

dm_late_forVmid_random_quants <- quantile(dm_late_forVmid_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(dm_late_forVmid_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting

plotting_VC_dm_late_forVmid <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dm_late_forVmid,dm_late_forVmid_random_quants,dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_alpha,"D. melanogaster","late")))

#



#

# within D. melanogaster, foreleg early vs midleg early correlations

dm_subset_for_early_VC <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% female_genes),]

dm_subset_mid_early_VC <- dm_subset_mid_early[which(dm_subset_mid_early$gene %in% female_genes),]

dm_early_forVmid <- ang.vec.alph(dm_subset_for_early_VC$estimate_log2, dm_subset_mid_early_VC$estimate_log2)

# lengths don't match again, need to figure out a way to fix this

#dp_subset_for_early_temp <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_subset_mid_early$gene)]

dm_early_forVmid_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(
  vec1 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
  vec2 = dm_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
  sig_vec = dm_subset_for_early_VC$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dm_early_forVmid_random[,1], breaks = 50)

dm_early_for_random_quants <- quantile(dm_early_forVmid_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
dm_early_for_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(dm_early_forVmid_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

#

plotting_dm_early_for <- as.data.frame(t(c(dm_early_forVmid,dm_early_for_random_quants,dm_early_for_random_quants_alpha,"D. melanogaster","early")))

#



# plot foreleg vs. midleg at both stages

temp <- as.data.frame(rbind(plotting_VC_dp_late_forVmid,plotting_VC_dp_early_forVmid,plotting_VC_dc_late_forVmid,plotting_dc_early_for,plotting_VC_dm_late_forVmid,plotting_dm_early_for))

colnames(temp) <- c("VC","Vangle","Alpha","alpha_c","ED","VC_LCL","VC_UCL","Alpha_LCL","Alpha_UCL","species","stage")

temp[1:9] <- sapply(temp[1:9], as.numeric)

for_mid_VC <- ggplot(temp, aes(x = stage, y = VC)) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~species) +
  ylim(-1,1) +
  ylab("Foreleg to Midleg \nVector Correlation") +
  xlab("Developmental Stage") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = VC_LCL, ymax = VC_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  xlab(NULL) +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank())  +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

for_mid_mag <- ggplot(temp, aes(x = stage, y = Alpha)) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~species) +
  ylab("change in vector magnitude\n (foreleg/midleg)") +
  xlab("Developmental Stage") +
  #ylim(0,1) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = Alpha_LCL, ymax = Alpha_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5)  +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

(for_mid_VC)/(for_mid_mag)

```


Pathway work
Start by loading in the pathway group data from flybase:

```{r}
pathway_ddat <- fread("../../data/pathway_group_data_fb_2024_04.tsv")
```

Insulin signalling pathway genes in the foreleg vs. midleg at each stage for all species

```{r}
INS_genes <- pathway_ddat$Group_member_FB_gene_symbol[grep("INS",pathway_ddat$FB_group_symbol)]

# get the subsetted data sets
dp_subset_for_late_INS <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% INS_genes)]
dp_subset_for_early_INS <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% INS_genes)]
dp_subset_mid_late_INS <- dp_subset_mid_late[which(dp_subset_mid_late$gene %in% INS_genes)]
dp_subset_mid_early_INS <- dp_subset_mid_early[which(dp_subset_mid_early$gene %in% INS_genes)]
#

dm_subset_for_late_INS <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% INS_genes)]
dm_subset_for_early_INS <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% INS_genes)]
dm_subset_mid_late_INS <- dm_subset_mid_late[which(dm_subset_mid_late$gene %in% INS_genes)]
dm_subset_mid_early_INS <- dm_subset_mid_early[which(dm_subset_mid_early$gene %in% INS_genes)]
#

dc_subset_for_late_INS <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% INS_genes)]
dc_subset_for_early_INS <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% INS_genes)]
dc_subset_mid_late_INS <- dc_subset_mid_late[which(dc_subset_mid_late$gene %in% INS_genes)]
dc_subset_mid_early_INS <- dc_subset_mid_early[which(dc_subset_mid_early$gene %in% INS_genes)]
#

# vector correlation of the 2LFC foreleg late genes in foreleg vs. midleg
VC_dp_late_forVmid_INS <- ang.vec.alph(dp_subset_for_late_INS$estimate_log2, dp_subset_mid_late_INS$estimate_log2)

dp_late_forVmid_random_INS <- t(replicate(10000,
                                      RandomVectorSampler(
                                        vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
vec2 = dp_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
sig_vec = dp_subset_for_late_INS$estimate_log2)))

dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_INS <- quantile(dp_late_forVmid_random_INS[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_INS_alpha <- quantile(dp_late_forVmid_random_INS[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting
plotting_VC_dp_late_forVmid_INS <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dp_late_forVmid_INS,dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_INS,dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_INS_alpha,"D. prolongata","Late")))


dp_early_forVmid_INS <- ang.vec.alph(dp_subset_for_early_INS$estimate_log2, dp_subset_mid_early_INS$estimate_log2)


dp_early_forVmid_random_INS <- t(replicate(10000,
                                       RandomVectorSampler(
                                         vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                         vec2 = dp_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
                                         sig_vec = dp_subset_for_early_INS$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dp_early_forVmid_random_INS[,1], breaks = 50)

dp_early_for_random_quants_INS <- quantile(dp_early_forVmid_random_INS[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dp_early_for_random_quants_INS_alpha <- quantile(dp_early_forVmid_random_INS[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_VC_dp_early_forVmid_INS <- as.data.frame(t(c(dp_early_forVmid_INS,dp_early_for_random_quants_INS,dp_early_for_random_quants_INS_alpha,"D. prolongata","Early")))
#

VC_dc_late_forVmid_INS <- ang.vec.alph(dc_subset_for_late_INS$estimate_log2, dc_subset_mid_late_INS$estimate_log2)

dc_late_forVmid_random_INS <- t(replicate(10000,
                                      RandomVectorSampler(
                                        vec1 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                        vec2 = dc_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
                                        sig_vec = dc_subset_for_late_INS$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dc_late_forVmid_random_INS[,1], breaks = 50)

dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_INS <- quantile(dc_late_forVmid_random_INS[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_INS_alpha <- quantile(dc_late_forVmid_random_INS[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting

plotting_VC_dc_late_forVmid_INS <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dc_late_forVmid_INS,dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_INS,dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_INS_alpha,"D. carrolli","Late")))
#

dc_early_forVmid_INS <- ang.vec.alph(dc_subset_for_early_INS$estimate_log2, dc_subset_mid_early_INS$estimate_log2)

dc_early_forVmid_random_INS <- t(replicate(10000,
                                       RandomVectorSampler(
                                         vec1 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                         vec2 = dc_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
                                         sig_vec = dc_subset_for_early_INS$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dc_early_forVmid_random_INS[,1], breaks = 50)

dc_early_for_random_quants_INS <- quantile(dc_early_forVmid_random_INS[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dc_early_for_random_quants_INS_alpha <- quantile(dc_early_forVmid_random_INS[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

#

plotting_dc_early_for_INS <- as.data.frame(t(c(dc_early_forVmid_INS,dc_early_for_random_quants_INS,dc_early_for_random_quants_INS_alpha,"D. carrolli","Early")))

#

VC_dm_late_forVmid_INS <- ang.vec.alph(dm_subset_for_late_INS$estimate_log2, dm_subset_mid_late_INS$estimate_log2)

dm_late_forVmid_random_INS <- t(replicate(10000,
                                      RandomVectorSampler(
                                        vec1 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                        vec2 = dm_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
                                        sig_vec = dm_subset_for_late_INS$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dm_late_forVmid_random_INS[,1], breaks = 50)

dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_INS <- quantile(dm_late_forVmid_random_INS[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_INS_alpha <- quantile(dm_late_forVmid_random_INS[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))


# for plotting

plotting_VC_dm_late_forVmid_INS <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dm_late_forVmid_INS,dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_INS,dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_INS_alpha,"D. melanogaster","Late")))

#

dm_early_forVmid_INS <- ang.vec.alph(dm_subset_for_early_INS$estimate_log2, dm_subset_mid_early_INS$estimate_log2)

dm_early_forVmid_random_INS <- t(replicate(10000,
                                       RandomVectorSampler(
                                         vec1 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                         vec2 = dm_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
                                         sig_vec = dm_subset_for_early_INS$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dm_early_forVmid_random_INS[,1], breaks = 50)

dm_early_for_random_quants_INS <- quantile(dm_early_forVmid_random_INS[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dm_early_for_random_quants_INS_alpha <- quantile(dm_early_forVmid_random_INS[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))


#

plotting_dm_early_for_INS <- as.data.frame(t(c(dm_early_forVmid_INS,dm_early_for_random_quants_INS,dm_early_for_random_quants_INS_alpha ,"D. melanogaster","Early")))

# plot foreleg vs. midleg at both stages

temp <- as.data.frame(rbind(plotting_VC_dp_late_forVmid_INS,plotting_VC_dp_early_forVmid_INS,plotting_VC_dc_late_forVmid_INS,plotting_dc_early_for_INS,plotting_VC_dm_late_forVmid_INS,plotting_dm_early_for_INS))

colnames(temp) <- c("VC","Vangle","Alpha","alpha_c","ED","VC_LCL","VC_UCL","Alpha_LCL","Alpha_UCL","species","stage")

temp[1:9] <- sapply(temp[1:9], as.numeric)

INS_VC <- ggplot(temp, aes(x = stage, y = VC)) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~species) +
  ylim(-1,1) +
  ylab("Foreleg to Midleg \nVector Correlation") +
  xlab("Developmental Stage") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = VC_LCL, ymax = VC_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  xlab(NULL) +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

INS_Mag <- ggplot(temp, aes(x = stage, y = Alpha)) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~species) +
  ylab("Change in foreleg\nvector magnitude") +
  xlab("Developmental Stage") +
  #ylim(0,1) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = Alpha_LCL, ymax = Alpha_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

(INS_VC)/(INS_Mag)

```

Notch signalling

```{r}

NOTCH_genes <- pathway_ddat$Group_member_FB_gene_symbol[grep("NTCH",pathway_ddat$FB_group_symbol)]

# get the subsetted data sets
dp_subset_for_late_NOTCH <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% NOTCH_genes)]
dp_subset_for_early_NOTCH <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% NOTCH_genes)]
dp_subset_mid_late_NOTCH <- dp_subset_mid_late[which(dp_subset_mid_late$gene %in% NOTCH_genes)]
dp_subset_mid_early_NOTCH <- dp_subset_mid_early[which(dp_subset_mid_early$gene %in% NOTCH_genes)]
#

dm_subset_for_late_NOTCH <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% NOTCH_genes)]
dm_subset_for_early_NOTCH <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% NOTCH_genes)]
dm_subset_mid_late_NOTCH <- dm_subset_mid_late[which(dm_subset_mid_late$gene %in% NOTCH_genes)]
dm_subset_mid_early_NOTCH <- dm_subset_mid_early[which(dm_subset_mid_early$gene %in% NOTCH_genes)]
#

dc_subset_for_late_NOTCH <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% NOTCH_genes)]
dc_subset_for_early_NOTCH <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% NOTCH_genes)]
dc_subset_mid_late_NOTCH <- dc_subset_mid_late[which(dc_subset_mid_late$gene %in% NOTCH_genes)]
dc_subset_mid_early_NOTCH <- dc_subset_mid_early[which(dc_subset_mid_early$gene %in% NOTCH_genes)]
#

# vector correlation of the 2LFC foreleg late genes in foreleg vs. midleg
VC_dp_late_forVmid_NOTCH <- ang.vec.alph(dp_subset_for_late_NOTCH$estimate_log2, dp_subset_mid_late_NOTCH$estimate_log2)

dp_late_forVmid_random_NOTCH <- t(replicate(10000,
                                      RandomVectorSampler(
                                        vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
vec2 = dp_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
sig_vec = dp_subset_for_late_NOTCH$estimate_log2)))

# whats the distribution of these random draws?
#hist(dp_late_forVmid_random_NOTCH[,1], breaks = 50)

# 95% quantiles on the random 10000 permutations
dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_NOTCH <- quantile(dp_late_forVmid_random_NOTCH[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_NOTCH_alpha <- quantile(dp_late_forVmid_random_NOTCH[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting
plotting_VC_dp_late_forVmid_NOTCH <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dp_late_forVmid_NOTCH,dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_NOTCH,dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_NOTCH_alpha,"D. prolongata","Late")))


dp_early_forVmid_NOTCH <- ang.vec.alph(dp_subset_for_early_NOTCH$estimate_log2, dp_subset_mid_early_NOTCH$estimate_log2)


dp_early_forVmid_random_NOTCH <- t(replicate(10000,
                                       RandomVectorSampler(
                                         vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                         vec2 = dp_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
                                         sig_vec = dp_subset_for_early_NOTCH$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dp_early_forVmid_random_NOTCH[,1], breaks = 50)

dp_early_for_random_quants_NOTCH <- quantile(dp_early_forVmid_random_NOTCH[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dp_early_for_random_quants_NOTCH_alpha <- quantile(dp_early_forVmid_random_NOTCH[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_VC_dp_early_forVmid_NOTCH <- as.data.frame(t(c(dp_early_forVmid_NOTCH,dp_early_for_random_quants_NOTCH,dp_early_for_random_quants_NOTCH_alpha,"D. prolongata","Early")))
#

VC_dc_late_forVmid_NOTCH <- ang.vec.alph(dc_subset_for_late_NOTCH$estimate_log2, dc_subset_mid_late_NOTCH$estimate_log2)

dc_late_forVmid_random_NOTCH <- t(replicate(10000,
                                      RandomVectorSampler(
                                        vec1 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                        vec2 = dc_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
                                        sig_vec = dc_subset_for_late_NOTCH$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dc_late_forVmid_random_NOTCH[,1], breaks = 50)

dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_NOTCH <- quantile(dc_late_forVmid_random_NOTCH[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_NOTCH_alpha <- quantile(dc_late_forVmid_random_NOTCH[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting

plotting_VC_dc_late_forVmid_NOTCH <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dc_late_forVmid_NOTCH,dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_NOTCH,dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_NOTCH_alpha,"D. carrolli","Late")))
#

dc_early_forVmid_NOTCH <- ang.vec.alph(dc_subset_for_early_NOTCH$estimate_log2, dc_subset_mid_early_NOTCH$estimate_log2)

dc_early_forVmid_random_NOTCH <- t(replicate(10000,
                                       RandomVectorSampler(
                                         vec1 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                         vec2 = dc_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
                                         sig_vec = dc_subset_for_early_NOTCH$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dc_early_forVmid_random_NOTCH[,1], breaks = 50)

dc_early_for_random_quants_NOTCH <- quantile(dc_early_forVmid_random_NOTCH[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dc_early_for_random_quants_NOTCH_alpha <- quantile(dc_early_forVmid_random_NOTCH[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

#

plotting_dc_early_for_NOTCH <- as.data.frame(t(c(dc_early_forVmid_NOTCH,dc_early_for_random_quants_NOTCH,dc_early_for_random_quants_NOTCH_alpha,"D. carrolli","Early")))

#

VC_dm_late_forVmid_NOTCH <- ang.vec.alph(dm_subset_for_late_NOTCH$estimate_log2, dm_subset_mid_late_NOTCH$estimate_log2)

dm_late_forVmid_random_NOTCH <- t(replicate(10000,
                                      RandomVectorSampler(
                                        vec1 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                        vec2 = dm_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
                                        sig_vec = dm_subset_for_late_NOTCH$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dm_late_forVmid_random_NOTCH[,1], breaks = 50)

dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_NOTCH <- quantile(dm_late_forVmid_random_NOTCH[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_NOTCH_alpha <- quantile(dm_late_forVmid_random_NOTCH[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))


# for plotting

plotting_VC_dm_late_forVmid_NOTCH <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dm_late_forVmid_NOTCH,dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_NOTCH,dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_NOTCH_alpha,"D. melanogaster","Late")))

#

dm_early_forVmid_NOTCH <- ang.vec.alph(dm_subset_for_early_NOTCH$estimate_log2, dm_subset_mid_early_NOTCH$estimate_log2)

dm_early_forVmid_random_NOTCH <- t(replicate(10000,
                                       RandomVectorSampler(
                                         vec1 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                         vec2 = dm_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
                                         sig_vec = dm_subset_for_early_NOTCH$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dm_early_forVmid_random_NOTCH[,1], breaks = 50)

dm_early_for_random_quants_NOTCH <- quantile(dm_early_forVmid_random_NOTCH[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dm_early_for_random_quants_NOTCH_alpha <- quantile(dm_early_forVmid_random_NOTCH[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))


#

plotting_dm_early_for_NOTCH <- as.data.frame(t(c(dm_early_forVmid_NOTCH,dm_early_for_random_quants_NOTCH,dm_early_for_random_quants_NOTCH_alpha ,"D. melanogaster","Early")))

# plot foreleg vs. midleg at both stages

temp <- as.data.frame(rbind(plotting_VC_dp_late_forVmid_NOTCH,plotting_VC_dp_early_forVmid_NOTCH,plotting_VC_dc_late_forVmid_NOTCH,plotting_dc_early_for_NOTCH,plotting_VC_dm_late_forVmid_NOTCH,plotting_dm_early_for_NOTCH))

colnames(temp) <- c("VC","Vangle","Alpha","alpha_c","ED","VC_LCL","VC_UCL","Alpha_LCL","Alpha_UCL","species","stage")

temp[1:9] <- sapply(temp[1:9], as.numeric)

NOTCH_VC <- ggplot(temp, aes(x = stage, y = VC)) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~species) +
  ylim(-1,1) +
  ylab("Foreleg to Midleg \nVector Correlation") +
  xlab("Developmental Stage") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = VC_LCL, ymax = VC_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  xlab(NULL) +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

NOTCH_Mag <- ggplot(temp, aes(x = stage, y = Alpha)) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~species) +
  ylab("Change in vector magnitude\n(foreleg/midleg)") +
  xlab("Developmental Stage") +
  #ylim(0,1) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = Alpha_LCL, ymax = Alpha_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

(NOTCH_VC)/(NOTCH_Mag)


```

EGFR signalling pathway genes in the foreleg vs. midleg at each stage for all species

```{r}
EGFR_genes <- pathway_ddat$Group_member_FB_gene_symbol[grep("EGFR",pathway_ddat$FB_group_symbol)]

# get the subsetted data sets
dp_subset_for_late_EGFR <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% EGFR_genes)]
dp_subset_for_early_EGFR <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% EGFR_genes)]
dp_subset_mid_late_EGFR <- dp_subset_mid_late[which(dp_subset_mid_late$gene %in% EGFR_genes)]
dp_subset_mid_early_EGFR <- dp_subset_mid_early[which(dp_subset_mid_early$gene %in% EGFR_genes)]
#

dm_subset_for_late_EGFR <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% EGFR_genes)]
dm_subset_for_early_EGFR <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% EGFR_genes)]
dm_subset_mid_late_EGFR <- dm_subset_mid_late[which(dm_subset_mid_late$gene %in% EGFR_genes)]
dm_subset_mid_early_EGFR <- dm_subset_mid_early[which(dm_subset_mid_early$gene %in% EGFR_genes)]
#

dc_subset_for_late_EGFR <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% EGFR_genes)]
dc_subset_for_early_EGFR <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% EGFR_genes)]
dc_subset_mid_late_EGFR <- dc_subset_mid_late[which(dc_subset_mid_late$gene %in% EGFR_genes)]
dc_subset_mid_early_EGFR <- dc_subset_mid_early[which(dc_subset_mid_early$gene %in% EGFR_genes)]
#

# vector correlation of the 2LFC foreleg late genes in foreleg vs. midleg
VC_dp_late_forVmid_EGFR <- ang.vec.alph(dp_subset_for_late_EGFR$estimate_log2, dp_subset_mid_late_EGFR$estimate_log2)

dp_late_forVmid_random_EGFR <- t(replicate(10000,
                                          RandomVectorSampler(
                                            vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                            vec2 = dp_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
                                            sig_vec = dp_subset_for_late_EGFR$estimate_log2)))

# whats the distribution of these random draws?
#hist(dp_late_forVmid_random_EGFR[,1], breaks = 50)

# 95% quantiles on the random 10000 permutations
dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_EGFR <- quantile(dp_late_forVmid_random_EGFR[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_EGFR_alpha <- quantile(dp_late_forVmid_random_EGFR[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting
plotting_VC_dp_late_forVmid_EGFR <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dp_late_forVmid_EGFR,dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_EGFR,dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_EGFR_alpha,"D. prolongata","Late")))


dp_early_forVmid_EGFR <- ang.vec.alph(dp_subset_for_early_EGFR$estimate_log2, dp_subset_mid_early_EGFR$estimate_log2)


dp_early_forVmid_random_EGFR <- t(replicate(10000,
                                           RandomVectorSampler(
                                             vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                             vec2 = dp_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
                                             sig_vec = dp_subset_for_early_EGFR$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dp_early_forVmid_random_EGFR[,1], breaks = 50)

dp_early_for_random_quants_EGFR <- quantile(dp_early_forVmid_random_EGFR[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dp_early_for_random_quants_EGFR_alpha <- quantile(dp_early_forVmid_random_EGFR[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_VC_dp_early_forVmid_EGFR <- as.data.frame(t(c(dp_early_forVmid_EGFR,dp_early_for_random_quants_EGFR,dp_early_for_random_quants_EGFR_alpha,"D. prolongata","Early")))
#

VC_dc_late_forVmid_EGFR <- ang.vec.alph(dc_subset_for_late_EGFR$estimate_log2, dc_subset_mid_late_EGFR$estimate_log2)

dc_late_forVmid_random_EGFR <- t(replicate(10000,
                                          RandomVectorSampler(
                                            vec1 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                            vec2 = dc_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
                                            sig_vec = dc_subset_for_late_EGFR$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dc_late_forVmid_random_EGFR[,1], breaks = 50)

dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_EGFR <- quantile(dc_late_forVmid_random_EGFR[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_EGFR_alpha <- quantile(dc_late_forVmid_random_EGFR[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting

plotting_VC_dc_late_forVmid_EGFR <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dc_late_forVmid_EGFR,dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_EGFR,dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_EGFR_alpha,"D. carrolli","Late")))
#

dc_early_forVmid_EGFR <- ang.vec.alph(dc_subset_for_early_EGFR$estimate_log2, dc_subset_mid_early_EGFR$estimate_log2)

dc_early_forVmid_random_EGFR <- t(replicate(10000,
                                           RandomVectorSampler(
                                             vec1 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                             vec2 = dc_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
                                             sig_vec = dc_subset_for_early_EGFR$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dc_early_forVmid_random_EGFR[,1], breaks = 50)

dc_early_for_random_quants_EGFR <- quantile(dc_early_forVmid_random_EGFR[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dc_early_for_random_quants_EGFR_alpha <- quantile(dc_early_forVmid_random_EGFR[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

#

plotting_dc_early_for_EGFR <- as.data.frame(t(c(dc_early_forVmid_EGFR,dc_early_for_random_quants_EGFR,dc_early_for_random_quants_EGFR_alpha,"D. carrolli","Early")))

#

VC_dm_late_forVmid_EGFR <- ang.vec.alph(dm_subset_for_late_EGFR$estimate_log2, dm_subset_mid_late_EGFR$estimate_log2)

dm_late_forVmid_random_EGFR <- t(replicate(10000,
                                          RandomVectorSampler(
                                            vec1 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                            vec2 = dm_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
                                            sig_vec = dm_subset_for_late_EGFR$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dm_late_forVmid_random_EGFR[,1], breaks = 50)

dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_EGFR <- quantile(dm_late_forVmid_random_EGFR[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_EGFR_alpha <- quantile(dm_late_forVmid_random_EGFR[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))


# for plotting

plotting_VC_dm_late_forVmid_EGFR <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dm_late_forVmid_EGFR,dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_EGFR,dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_EGFR_alpha,"D. melanogaster","Late")))

#

dm_early_forVmid_EGFR <- ang.vec.alph(dm_subset_for_early_EGFR$estimate_log2, dm_subset_mid_early_EGFR$estimate_log2)

dm_early_forVmid_random_EGFR <- t(replicate(10000,
                                           RandomVectorSampler(
                                             vec1 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                             vec2 = dm_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
                                             sig_vec = dm_subset_for_early_EGFR$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dm_early_forVmid_random_EGFR[,1], breaks = 50)

dm_early_for_random_quants_EGFR <- quantile(dm_early_forVmid_random_EGFR[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dm_early_for_random_quants_EGFR_alpha <- quantile(dm_early_forVmid_random_EGFR[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))


#

plotting_dm_early_for_EGFR <- as.data.frame(t(c(dm_early_forVmid_EGFR,dm_early_for_random_quants_EGFR,dm_early_for_random_quants_EGFR_alpha ,"D. melanogaster","Early")))

# plot foreleg vs. midleg at both stages

temp <- as.data.frame(rbind(plotting_VC_dp_late_forVmid_EGFR,plotting_VC_dp_early_forVmid_EGFR,plotting_VC_dc_late_forVmid_EGFR,plotting_dc_early_for_EGFR,plotting_VC_dm_late_forVmid_EGFR,plotting_dm_early_for_EGFR))

colnames(temp) <- c("VC","Vangle","Alpha","alpha_c","ED","VC_LCL","VC_UCL","Alpha_LCL","Alpha_UCL","species","stage")

temp[1:9] <- sapply(temp[1:9], as.numeric)

EGFR_VC <- ggplot(temp, aes(x = stage, y = VC)) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~species) +
  ylim(-1,1) +
  ylab("Foreleg to Midleg \nVector Correlation") +
  xlab("Developmental Stage") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = VC_LCL, ymax = VC_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

EGFR_Mag <- ggplot(temp, aes(x = stage, y = Alpha)) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~species) +
  ylab("Change in vector magnitude\n(foreleg/midleg)") +
  xlab("Developmental Stage") +
  #ylim(0,1) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = Alpha_LCL, ymax = Alpha_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))


(EGFR_VC)/(EGFR_Mag)

```

Hippo signalling pathway genes in the foreleg vs. midleg at each stage for all species

```{r}
SWH_genes <- pathway_ddat$Group_member_FB_gene_symbol[grep("SWH",pathway_ddat$FB_group_symbol)]

# get the subsetted data sets
dp_subset_for_late_SWH <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% SWH_genes)]
dp_subset_for_early_SWH <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% SWH_genes)]
dp_subset_mid_late_SWH <- dp_subset_mid_late[which(dp_subset_mid_late$gene %in% SWH_genes)]
dp_subset_mid_early_SWH <- dp_subset_mid_early[which(dp_subset_mid_early$gene %in% SWH_genes)]
#

dm_subset_for_late_SWH <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% SWH_genes)]
dm_subset_for_early_SWH <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% SWH_genes)]
dm_subset_mid_late_SWH <- dm_subset_mid_late[which(dm_subset_mid_late$gene %in% SWH_genes)]
dm_subset_mid_early_SWH <- dm_subset_mid_early[which(dm_subset_mid_early$gene %in% SWH_genes)]
#

dc_subset_for_late_SWH <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% SWH_genes)]
dc_subset_for_early_SWH <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% SWH_genes)]
dc_subset_mid_late_SWH <- dc_subset_mid_late[which(dc_subset_mid_late$gene %in% SWH_genes)]
dc_subset_mid_early_SWH <- dc_subset_mid_early[which(dc_subset_mid_early$gene %in% SWH_genes)]
#

# vector correlation of the 2LFC foreleg late genes in foreleg vs. midleg
VC_dp_late_forVmid_SWH <- ang.vec.alph(dp_subset_for_late_SWH$estimate_log2, dp_subset_mid_late_SWH$estimate_log2)

dp_late_forVmid_random_SWH <- t(replicate(10000,
                                          RandomVectorSampler(
                                            vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                            vec2 = dp_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
                                            sig_vec = dp_subset_for_late_SWH$estimate_log2)))

# whats the distribution of these random draws?
#hist(dp_late_forVmid_random_SWH[,1], breaks = 50)

# 95% quantiles on the random 10000 permutations
dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_SWH <- quantile(dp_late_forVmid_random_SWH[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_SWH_alpha <- quantile(dp_late_forVmid_random_SWH[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting
plotting_VC_dp_late_forVmid_SWH <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dp_late_forVmid_SWH,dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_SWH,dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_SWH_alpha,"D. prolongata","Late")))


dp_early_forVmid_SWH <- ang.vec.alph(dp_subset_for_early_SWH$estimate_log2, dp_subset_mid_early_SWH$estimate_log2)


dp_early_forVmid_random_SWH <- t(replicate(10000,
                                           RandomVectorSampler(
                                             vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                             vec2 = dp_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
                                             sig_vec = dp_subset_for_early_SWH$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dp_early_forVmid_random_SWH[,1], breaks = 50)

dp_early_for_random_quants_SWH <- quantile(dp_early_forVmid_random_SWH[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dp_early_for_random_quants_SWH_alpha <- quantile(dp_early_forVmid_random_SWH[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_VC_dp_early_forVmid_SWH <- as.data.frame(t(c(dp_early_forVmid_SWH,dp_early_for_random_quants_SWH,dp_early_for_random_quants_SWH_alpha,"D. prolongata","Early")))
#

VC_dc_late_forVmid_SWH <- ang.vec.alph(dc_subset_for_late_SWH$estimate_log2, dc_subset_mid_late_SWH$estimate_log2)

dc_late_forVmid_random_SWH <- t(replicate(10000,
                                          RandomVectorSampler(
                                            vec1 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                            vec2 = dc_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
                                            sig_vec = dc_subset_for_late_SWH$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dc_late_forVmid_random_SWH[,1], breaks = 50)

dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_SWH <- quantile(dc_late_forVmid_random_SWH[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_SWH_alpha <- quantile(dc_late_forVmid_random_SWH[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting

plotting_VC_dc_late_forVmid_SWH <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dc_late_forVmid_SWH,dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_SWH,dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_SWH_alpha,"D. carrolli","Late")))
#

dc_early_forVmid_SWH <- ang.vec.alph(dc_subset_for_early_SWH$estimate_log2, dc_subset_mid_early_SWH$estimate_log2)

dc_early_forVmid_random_SWH <- t(replicate(10000,
                                           RandomVectorSampler(
                                             vec1 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                             vec2 = dc_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
                                             sig_vec = dc_subset_for_early_SWH$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dc_early_forVmid_random_SWH[,1], breaks = 50)

dc_early_for_random_quants_SWH <- quantile(dc_early_forVmid_random_SWH[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dc_early_for_random_quants_SWH_alpha <- quantile(dc_early_forVmid_random_SWH[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

#

plotting_dc_early_for_SWH <- as.data.frame(t(c(dc_early_forVmid_SWH,dc_early_for_random_quants_SWH,dc_early_for_random_quants_SWH_alpha,"D. carrolli","Early")))

#

VC_dm_late_forVmid_SWH <- ang.vec.alph(dm_subset_for_late_SWH$estimate_log2, dm_subset_mid_late_SWH$estimate_log2)

dm_late_forVmid_random_SWH <- t(replicate(10000,
                                          RandomVectorSampler(
                                            vec1 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                            vec2 = dm_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
                                            sig_vec = dm_subset_for_late_SWH$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dm_late_forVmid_random_SWH[,1], breaks = 50)

dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_SWH <- quantile(dm_late_forVmid_random_SWH[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_SWH_alpha <- quantile(dm_late_forVmid_random_SWH[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))


# for plotting

plotting_VC_dm_late_forVmid_SWH <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dm_late_forVmid_SWH,dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_SWH,dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_SWH_alpha,"D. melanogaster","Late")))

#

dm_early_forVmid_SWH <- ang.vec.alph(dm_subset_for_early_SWH$estimate_log2, dm_subset_mid_early_SWH$estimate_log2)

dm_early_forVmid_random_SWH <- t(replicate(10000,
                                           RandomVectorSampler(
                                             vec1 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                             vec2 = dm_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
                                             sig_vec = dm_subset_for_early_SWH$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dm_early_forVmid_random_SWH[,1], breaks = 50)

dm_early_for_random_quants_SWH <- quantile(dm_early_forVmid_random_SWH[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dm_early_for_random_quants_SWH_alpha <- quantile(dm_early_forVmid_random_SWH[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))


#

plotting_dm_early_for_SWH <- as.data.frame(t(c(dm_early_forVmid_SWH,dm_early_for_random_quants_SWH,dm_early_for_random_quants_SWH_alpha ,"D. melanogaster","Early")))

# plot foreleg vs. midleg at both stages

temp <- as.data.frame(rbind(plotting_VC_dp_late_forVmid_SWH,plotting_VC_dp_early_forVmid_SWH,plotting_VC_dc_late_forVmid_SWH,plotting_dc_early_for_SWH,plotting_VC_dm_late_forVmid_SWH,plotting_dm_early_for_SWH))

colnames(temp) <- c("VC","Vangle","Alpha","alpha_c","ED","VC_LCL","VC_UCL","Alpha_LCL","Alpha_UCL","species","stage")

temp[1:9] <- sapply(temp[1:9], as.numeric)

hippo_VC <- ggplot(temp, aes(x = stage, y = VC)) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~species) +
  ylim(-1,1) +
  ylab("Foreleg to Midleg \nVector Correlation") +
  xlab("Developmental Stage") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = VC_LCL, ymax = VC_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))


hippo_Mag <- ggplot(temp, aes(x = stage, y = Alpha)) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~species) +
  ylab("Change in vector magnitude\n(foreleg/midleg)") +
  xlab("Developmental Stage") +
  #ylim(0,1) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = Alpha_LCL, ymax = Alpha_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))


(hippo_VC)/(hippo_Mag)

```

WNT signalling pathway genes in the foreleg vs. midleg at each stage for all species

```{r}
WNT_genes <- pathway_ddat$Group_member_FB_gene_symbol[grep("WNT",pathway_ddat$FB_group_symbol)]

# get the subsetted data sets
dp_subset_for_late_WNT <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% WNT_genes)]
dp_subset_for_early_WNT <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% WNT_genes)]
dp_subset_mid_late_WNT <- dp_subset_mid_late[which(dp_subset_mid_late$gene %in% WNT_genes)]
dp_subset_mid_early_WNT <- dp_subset_mid_early[which(dp_subset_mid_early$gene %in% WNT_genes)]
#

dm_subset_for_late_WNT <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% WNT_genes)]
dm_subset_for_early_WNT <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% WNT_genes)]
dm_subset_mid_late_WNT <- dm_subset_mid_late[which(dm_subset_mid_late$gene %in% WNT_genes)]
dm_subset_mid_early_WNT <- dm_subset_mid_early[which(dm_subset_mid_early$gene %in% WNT_genes)]
#

dc_subset_for_late_WNT <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% WNT_genes)]
dc_subset_for_early_WNT <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% WNT_genes)]
dc_subset_mid_late_WNT <- dc_subset_mid_late[which(dc_subset_mid_late$gene %in% WNT_genes)]
dc_subset_mid_early_WNT <- dc_subset_mid_early[which(dc_subset_mid_early$gene %in% WNT_genes)]
#

# vector correlation of the 2LFC foreleg late genes in foreleg vs. midleg
VC_dp_late_forVmid_WNT <- ang.vec.alph(dp_subset_for_late_WNT$estimate_log2, dp_subset_mid_late_WNT$estimate_log2)

dp_late_forVmid_random_WNT <- t(replicate(10000,
                                          RandomVectorSampler(
                                            vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                            vec2 = dp_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
                                            sig_vec = dp_subset_for_late_WNT$estimate_log2)))

# whats the distribution of these random draws?
#hist(dp_late_forVmid_random_WNT[,1], breaks = 50)

# 95% quantiles on the random 10000 permutations
dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_WNT <- quantile(dp_late_forVmid_random_WNT[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_WNT_alpha <- quantile(dp_late_forVmid_random_WNT[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting
plotting_VC_dp_late_forVmid_WNT <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dp_late_forVmid_WNT,dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_WNT,dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_WNT_alpha,"D. prolongata","Late")))


dp_early_forVmid_WNT <- ang.vec.alph(dp_subset_for_early_WNT$estimate_log2, dp_subset_mid_early_WNT$estimate_log2)


dp_early_forVmid_random_WNT <- t(replicate(10000,
                                           RandomVectorSampler(
                                             vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                             vec2 = dp_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
                                             sig_vec = dp_subset_for_early_WNT$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dp_early_forVmid_random_WNT[,1], breaks = 50)

dp_early_for_random_quants_WNT <- quantile(dp_early_forVmid_random_WNT[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dp_early_for_random_quants_WNT_alpha <- quantile(dp_early_forVmid_random_WNT[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_VC_dp_early_forVmid_WNT <- as.data.frame(t(c(dp_early_forVmid_WNT,dp_early_for_random_quants_WNT,dp_early_for_random_quants_WNT_alpha,"D. prolongata","Early")))
#

VC_dc_late_forVmid_WNT <- ang.vec.alph(dc_subset_for_late_WNT$estimate_log2, dc_subset_mid_late_WNT$estimate_log2)

dc_late_forVmid_random_WNT <- t(replicate(10000,
                                          RandomVectorSampler(
                                            vec1 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                            vec2 = dc_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
                                            sig_vec = dc_subset_for_late_WNT$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dc_late_forVmid_random_WNT[,1], breaks = 50)

dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_WNT <- quantile(dc_late_forVmid_random_WNT[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_WNT_alpha <- quantile(dc_late_forVmid_random_WNT[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting

plotting_VC_dc_late_forVmid_WNT <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dc_late_forVmid_WNT,dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_WNT,dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_WNT_alpha,"D. carrolli","Late")))
#

dc_early_forVmid_WNT <- ang.vec.alph(dc_subset_for_early_WNT$estimate_log2, dc_subset_mid_early_WNT$estimate_log2)

dc_early_forVmid_random_WNT <- t(replicate(10000,
                                           RandomVectorSampler(
                                             vec1 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                             vec2 = dc_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
                                             sig_vec = dc_subset_for_early_WNT$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dc_early_forVmid_random_WNT[,1], breaks = 50)

dc_early_for_random_quants_WNT <- quantile(dc_early_forVmid_random_WNT[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dc_early_for_random_quants_WNT_alpha <- quantile(dc_early_forVmid_random_WNT[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

#

plotting_dc_early_for_WNT <- as.data.frame(t(c(dc_early_forVmid_WNT,dc_early_for_random_quants_WNT,dc_early_for_random_quants_WNT_alpha,"D. carrolli","Early")))

#

VC_dm_late_forVmid_WNT <- ang.vec.alph(dm_subset_for_late_WNT$estimate_log2, dm_subset_mid_late_WNT$estimate_log2)

dm_late_forVmid_random_WNT <- t(replicate(10000,
                                          RandomVectorSampler(
                                            vec1 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                            vec2 = dm_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
                                            sig_vec = dm_subset_for_late_WNT$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dm_late_forVmid_random_WNT[,1], breaks = 50)

dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_WNT <- quantile(dm_late_forVmid_random_WNT[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_WNT_alpha <- quantile(dm_late_forVmid_random_WNT[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))


# for plotting

plotting_VC_dm_late_forVmid_WNT <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dm_late_forVmid_WNT,dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_WNT,dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_WNT_alpha,"D. melanogaster","Late")))

#

dm_early_forVmid_WNT <- ang.vec.alph(dm_subset_for_early_WNT$estimate_log2, dm_subset_mid_early_WNT$estimate_log2)

dm_early_forVmid_random_WNT <- t(replicate(10000,
                                           RandomVectorSampler(
                                             vec1 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                             vec2 = dm_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
                                             sig_vec = dm_subset_for_early_WNT$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dm_early_forVmid_random_WNT[,1], breaks = 50)

dm_early_for_random_quants_WNT <- quantile(dm_early_forVmid_random_WNT[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dm_early_for_random_quants_WNT_alpha <- quantile(dm_early_forVmid_random_WNT[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))


#

plotting_dm_early_for_WNT <- as.data.frame(t(c(dm_early_forVmid_WNT,dm_early_for_random_quants_WNT,dm_early_for_random_quants_WNT_alpha ,"D. melanogaster","Early")))

# plot foreleg vs. midleg at both stages

temp <- as.data.frame(rbind(plotting_VC_dp_late_forVmid_WNT,plotting_VC_dp_early_forVmid_WNT,plotting_VC_dc_late_forVmid_WNT,plotting_dc_early_for_WNT,plotting_VC_dm_late_forVmid_WNT,plotting_dm_early_for_WNT))

colnames(temp) <- c("VC","Vangle","Alpha","alpha_c","ED","VC_LCL","VC_UCL","Alpha_LCL","Alpha_UCL","species","stage")

temp[1:9] <- sapply(temp[1:9], as.numeric)

WNT_VC <- ggplot(temp, aes(x = stage, y = VC)) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~species) +
  ylim(-1,1) +
  ylab("Foreleg to Midleg \nVector Correlation") +
  xlab("Developmental Stage") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = VC_LCL, ymax = VC_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))


WNT_Mag <- ggplot(temp, aes(x = stage, y = Alpha)) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~species) +
  ylab("Change in vector magnitude\n(foreleg/midleg)") +
  xlab("Developmental Stage") +
  #ylim(0,1) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = Alpha_LCL, ymax = Alpha_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

(WNT_VC)/(WNT_Mag)

```

BMP signalling pathway genes in the foreleg vs. midleg at each stage for all species

```{r}
BMP_genes <- pathway_ddat$Group_member_FB_gene_symbol[grep("BMP",pathway_ddat$FB_group_symbol)]

# get the subsetted data sets
dp_subset_for_late_BMP <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% BMP_genes)]
dp_subset_for_early_BMP <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% BMP_genes)]
dp_subset_mid_late_BMP <- dp_subset_mid_late[which(dp_subset_mid_late$gene %in% BMP_genes)]
dp_subset_mid_early_BMP <- dp_subset_mid_early[which(dp_subset_mid_early$gene %in% BMP_genes)]
#

dm_subset_for_late_BMP <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% BMP_genes)]
dm_subset_for_early_BMP <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% BMP_genes)]
dm_subset_mid_late_BMP <- dm_subset_mid_late[which(dm_subset_mid_late$gene %in% BMP_genes)]
dm_subset_mid_early_BMP <- dm_subset_mid_early[which(dm_subset_mid_early$gene %in% BMP_genes)]
#

dc_subset_for_late_BMP <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% BMP_genes)]
dc_subset_for_early_BMP <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% BMP_genes)]
dc_subset_mid_late_BMP <- dc_subset_mid_late[which(dc_subset_mid_late$gene %in% BMP_genes)]
dc_subset_mid_early_BMP <- dc_subset_mid_early[which(dc_subset_mid_early$gene %in% BMP_genes)]
#

# vector correlation of the 2LFC foreleg late genes in foreleg vs. midleg
VC_dp_late_forVmid_BMP <- ang.vec.alph(dp_subset_for_late_BMP$estimate_log2, dp_subset_mid_late_BMP$estimate_log2)

dp_late_forVmid_random_BMP <- t(replicate(10000,
                                          RandomVectorSampler(
                                            vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                            vec2 = dp_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
                                            sig_vec = dp_subset_for_late_BMP$estimate_log2)))

# whats the distribution of these random draws?
#hist(dp_late_forVmid_random_BMP[,1], breaks = 50)

# 95% quantiles on the random 10000 permutations
dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_BMP <- quantile(dp_late_forVmid_random_BMP[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_BMP_alpha <- quantile(dp_late_forVmid_random_BMP[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting
plotting_VC_dp_late_forVmid_BMP <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dp_late_forVmid_BMP,dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_BMP,dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_BMP_alpha,"D. prolongata","Late")))


dp_early_forVmid_BMP <- ang.vec.alph(dp_subset_for_early_BMP$estimate_log2, dp_subset_mid_early_BMP$estimate_log2)


dp_early_forVmid_random_BMP <- t(replicate(10000,
                                           RandomVectorSampler(
                                             vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                             vec2 = dp_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
                                             sig_vec = dp_subset_for_early_BMP$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dp_early_forVmid_random_BMP[,1], breaks = 50)

dp_early_for_random_quants_BMP <- quantile(dp_early_forVmid_random_BMP[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dp_early_for_random_quants_BMP_alpha <- quantile(dp_early_forVmid_random_BMP[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_VC_dp_early_forVmid_BMP <- as.data.frame(t(c(dp_early_forVmid_BMP,dp_early_for_random_quants_BMP,dp_early_for_random_quants_BMP_alpha,"D. prolongata","Early")))
#

VC_dc_late_forVmid_BMP <- ang.vec.alph(dc_subset_for_late_BMP$estimate_log2, dc_subset_mid_late_BMP$estimate_log2)

dc_late_forVmid_random_BMP <- t(replicate(10000,
                                          RandomVectorSampler(
                                            vec1 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                            vec2 = dc_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
                                            sig_vec = dc_subset_for_late_BMP$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dc_late_forVmid_random_BMP[,1], breaks = 50)

dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_BMP <- quantile(dc_late_forVmid_random_BMP[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_BMP_alpha <- quantile(dc_late_forVmid_random_BMP[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting

plotting_VC_dc_late_forVmid_BMP <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dc_late_forVmid_BMP,dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_BMP,dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_BMP_alpha,"D. carrolli","Late")))
#

dc_early_forVmid_BMP <- ang.vec.alph(dc_subset_for_early_BMP$estimate_log2, dc_subset_mid_early_BMP$estimate_log2)

dc_early_forVmid_random_BMP <- t(replicate(10000,
                                           RandomVectorSampler(
                                             vec1 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                             vec2 = dc_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
                                             sig_vec = dc_subset_for_early_BMP$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dc_early_forVmid_random_BMP[,1], breaks = 50)

dc_early_for_random_quants_BMP <- quantile(dc_early_forVmid_random_BMP[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dc_early_for_random_quants_BMP_alpha <- quantile(dc_early_forVmid_random_BMP[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

#

plotting_dc_early_for_BMP <- as.data.frame(t(c(dc_early_forVmid_BMP,dc_early_for_random_quants_BMP,dc_early_for_random_quants_BMP_alpha,"D. carrolli","Early")))

#

VC_dm_late_forVmid_BMP <- ang.vec.alph(dm_subset_for_late_BMP$estimate_log2, dm_subset_mid_late_BMP$estimate_log2)

dm_late_forVmid_random_BMP <- t(replicate(10000,
                                          RandomVectorSampler(
                                            vec1 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                            vec2 = dm_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
                                            sig_vec = dm_subset_for_late_BMP$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dm_late_forVmid_random_BMP[,1], breaks = 50)

dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_BMP <- quantile(dm_late_forVmid_random_BMP[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_BMP_alpha <- quantile(dm_late_forVmid_random_BMP[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))


# for plotting

plotting_VC_dm_late_forVmid_BMP <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dm_late_forVmid_BMP,dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_BMP,dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_BMP_alpha,"D. melanogaster","Late")))

#

dm_early_forVmid_BMP <- ang.vec.alph(dm_subset_for_early_BMP$estimate_log2, dm_subset_mid_early_BMP$estimate_log2)

dm_early_forVmid_random_BMP <- t(replicate(10000,
                                           RandomVectorSampler(
                                             vec1 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                             vec2 = dm_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
                                             sig_vec = dm_subset_for_early_BMP$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dm_early_forVmid_random_BMP[,1], breaks = 50)

dm_early_for_random_quants_BMP <- quantile(dm_early_forVmid_random_BMP[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
```
