```{r}
dm_early_for_random_quants_BMP_alpha <- quantile(dm_early_forVmid_random_BMP[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))


#

plotting_dm_early_for_BMP <- as.data.frame(t(c(dm_early_forVmid_BMP,dm_early_for_random_quants_BMP,dm_early_for_random_quants_BMP_alpha ,"D. melanogaster","Early")))

# plot foreleg vs. midleg at both stages

temp <- as.data.frame(rbind(plotting_VC_dp_late_forVmid_BMP,plotting_VC_dp_early_forVmid_BMP,plotting_VC_dc_late_forVmid_BMP,plotting_dc_early_for_BMP,plotting_VC_dm_late_forVmid_BMP,plotting_dm_early_for_BMP))

colnames(temp) <- c("VC","Vangle","Alpha","alpha_c","ED","VC_LCL","VC_UCL","Alpha_LCL","Alpha_UCL","species","stage")

temp[1:9] <- sapply(temp[1:9], as.numeric)

BMP_VC <- ggplot(temp, aes(x = stage, y = VC)) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~species) +
  ylim(-1,1) +
  ylab("Foreleg to Midleg \nVector Correlation") +
  xlab("Developmental Stage") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = VC_LCL, ymax = VC_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))


BMP_Mag <- ggplot(temp, aes(x = stage, y = Alpha)) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~species) +
  ylab("Change in vector magnitude\n(foreleg/midleg)") +
  xlab("Developmental Stage") +
  #ylim(0,1) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = Alpha_LCL, ymax = Alpha_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

(BMP_VC)/(BMP_Mag)

```

HH signalling pathway genes in the foreleg vs. midleg at each stage for all species

```{r}
HH_genes <- pathway_ddat$Group_member_FB_gene_symbol[grep("HH",pathway_ddat$FB_group_symbol)]

# get the subsetted data sets
dp_subset_for_late_HH <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% HH_genes)]
dp_subset_for_early_HH <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% HH_genes)]
dp_subset_mid_late_HH <- dp_subset_mid_late[which(dp_subset_mid_late$gene %in% HH_genes)]
dp_subset_mid_early_HH <- dp_subset_mid_early[which(dp_subset_mid_early$gene %in% HH_genes)]
#

dm_subset_for_late_HH <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% HH_genes)]
dm_subset_for_early_HH <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% HH_genes)]
dm_subset_mid_late_HH <- dm_subset_mid_late[which(dm_subset_mid_late$gene %in% HH_genes)]
dm_subset_mid_early_HH <- dm_subset_mid_early[which(dm_subset_mid_early$gene %in% HH_genes)]
#

dc_subset_for_late_HH <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% HH_genes)]
dc_subset_for_early_HH <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% HH_genes)]
dc_subset_mid_late_HH <- dc_subset_mid_late[which(dc_subset_mid_late$gene %in% HH_genes)]
dc_subset_mid_early_HH <- dc_subset_mid_early[which(dc_subset_mid_early$gene %in% HH_genes)]
#

# vector correlation of the 2LFC foreleg late genes in foreleg vs. midleg
VC_dp_late_forVmid_HH <- ang.vec.alph(dp_subset_for_late_HH$estimate_log2, dp_subset_mid_late_HH$estimate_log2)

dp_late_forVmid_random_HH <- t(replicate(10000,
                                          RandomVectorSampler(
                                            vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                            vec2 = dp_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
                                            sig_vec = dp_subset_for_late_HH$estimate_log2)))

# whats the distribution of these random draws?
#hist(dp_late_forVmid_random_HH[,1], breaks = 50)

# 95% quantiles on the random 10000 permutations
dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_HH <- quantile(dp_late_forVmid_random_HH[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_HH_alpha <- quantile(dp_late_forVmid_random_HH[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting
plotting_VC_dp_late_forVmid_HH <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dp_late_forVmid_HH,dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_HH,dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_HH_alpha,"D. prolongata","Late")))


dp_early_forVmid_HH <- ang.vec.alph(dp_subset_for_early_HH$estimate_log2, dp_subset_mid_early_HH$estimate_log2)


dp_early_forVmid_random_HH <- t(replicate(10000,
                                           RandomVectorSampler(
                                             vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                             vec2 = dp_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
                                             sig_vec = dp_subset_for_early_HH$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dp_early_forVmid_random_HH[,1], breaks = 50)

dp_early_for_random_quants_HH <- quantile(dp_early_forVmid_random_HH[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dp_early_for_random_quants_HH_alpha <- quantile(dp_early_forVmid_random_HH[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_VC_dp_early_forVmid_HH <- as.data.frame(t(c(dp_early_forVmid_HH,dp_early_for_random_quants_HH,dp_early_for_random_quants_HH_alpha,"D. prolongata","Early")))
#

VC_dc_late_forVmid_HH <- ang.vec.alph(dc_subset_for_late_HH$estimate_log2, dc_subset_mid_late_HH$estimate_log2)

dc_late_forVmid_random_HH <- t(replicate(10000,
                                          RandomVectorSampler(
                                            vec1 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                            vec2 = dc_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
                                            sig_vec = dc_subset_for_late_HH$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dc_late_forVmid_random_HH[,1], breaks = 50)

dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_HH <- quantile(dc_late_forVmid_random_HH[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_HH_alpha <- quantile(dc_late_forVmid_random_HH[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting

plotting_VC_dc_late_forVmid_HH <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dc_late_forVmid_HH,dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_HH,dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_HH_alpha,"D. carrolli","Late")))
#

dc_early_forVmid_HH <- ang.vec.alph(dc_subset_for_early_HH$estimate_log2, dc_subset_mid_early_HH$estimate_log2)

dc_early_forVmid_random_HH <- t(replicate(10000,
                                           RandomVectorSampler(
                                             vec1 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                             vec2 = dc_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
                                             sig_vec = dc_subset_for_early_HH$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dc_early_forVmid_random_HH[,1], breaks = 50)

dc_early_for_random_quants_HH <- quantile(dc_early_forVmid_random_HH[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dc_early_for_random_quants_HH_alpha <- quantile(dc_early_forVmid_random_HH[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

#

plotting_dc_early_for_HH <- as.data.frame(t(c(dc_early_forVmid_HH,dc_early_for_random_quants_HH,dc_early_for_random_quants_HH_alpha,"D. carrolli","Early")))

#

VC_dm_late_forVmid_HH <- ang.vec.alph(dm_subset_for_late_HH$estimate_log2, dm_subset_mid_late_HH$estimate_log2)

dm_late_forVmid_random_HH <- t(replicate(10000,
                                          RandomVectorSampler(
                                            vec1 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                            vec2 = dm_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
                                            sig_vec = dm_subset_for_late_HH$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dm_late_forVmid_random_HH[,1], breaks = 50)

dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_HH <- quantile(dm_late_forVmid_random_HH[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_HH_alpha <- quantile(dm_late_forVmid_random_HH[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))


# for plotting

plotting_VC_dm_late_forVmid_HH <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dm_late_forVmid_HH,dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_HH,dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_HH_alpha,"D. melanogaster","Late")))

#

dm_early_forVmid_HH <- ang.vec.alph(dm_subset_for_early_HH$estimate_log2, dm_subset_mid_early_HH$estimate_log2)

dm_early_forVmid_random_HH <- t(replicate(10000,
                                           RandomVectorSampler(
                                             vec1 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                             vec2 = dm_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
                                             sig_vec = dm_subset_for_early_HH$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dm_early_forVmid_random_HH[,1], breaks = 50)

dm_early_for_random_quants_HH <- quantile(dm_early_forVmid_random_HH[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

dm_early_for_random_quants_HH_alpha <- quantile(dm_early_forVmid_random_HH[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))


#

plotting_dm_early_for_HH <- as.data.frame(t(c(dm_early_forVmid_HH,dm_early_for_random_quants_HH,dm_early_for_random_quants_HH_alpha ,"D. melanogaster","Early")))

# plot foreleg vs. midleg at both stages

temp <- as.data.frame(rbind(plotting_VC_dp_late_forVmid_HH,plotting_VC_dp_early_forVmid_HH,plotting_VC_dc_late_forVmid_HH,plotting_dc_early_for_HH,plotting_VC_dm_late_forVmid_HH,plotting_dm_early_for_HH))

colnames(temp) <- c("VC","Vangle","Alpha","alpha_c","ED","VC_LCL","VC_UCL","Alpha_LCL","Alpha_UCL","species","stage")

temp[1:9] <- sapply(temp[1:9], as.numeric)

HH_VC <- ggplot(temp, aes(x = stage, y = VC)) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~species) +
  ylim(-1,1) +
  ylab("Foreleg to Midleg \nVector Correlation") +
  xlab("Developmental Stage") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = VC_LCL, ymax = VC_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  xlab(NULL) +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))


HH_Mag <- ggplot(temp, aes(x = stage, y = Alpha)) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~species) +
  ylab("Change in vector magnitude\n(foreleg/midleg)") +
  xlab("Developmental Stage") +
  #ylim(0,1) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = Alpha_LCL, ymax = Alpha_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

(HH_VC)/(HH_Mag)
```

# Below is signalling genes between species #

Dp genes of Interest signalling in the foreleg at both developmental stages between prolongata and the other two species

```{r}
dp_GOI <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% genes_of_interest)]

dc_GOI <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% dp_GOI$gene)]

dp_GOI <- dp_GOI[dp_GOI$gene %in% dc_GOI$gene]

GOI_dpdc_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dp_GOI$estimate_log2, dc_GOI$estimate_log2)

GOI_dpdc_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dp_GOI$estimate_log2)))

GOI_dpdc_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(GOI_dpdc_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
GOI_dpdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(GOI_dpdc_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdc_GOI_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(GOI_dpdc_for_late,GOI_dpdc_for_late_random_quants,GOI_dpdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. carrolli","Late")))

dp_GOI <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% genes_of_interest)]

dm_GOI <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% dp_GOI$gene)]

dp_GOI <- dp_GOI[dp_GOI$gene %in% dm_GOI$gene]

GOI_dpdm_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dp_GOI$estimate_log2, dm_GOI$estimate_log2)

GOI_dpdm_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dp_GOI$estimate_log2)))

GOI_dpdm_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(GOI_dpdm_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

GOI_dpdm_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(GOI_dpdm_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdm_GOI_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(GOI_dpdm_for_late,GOI_dpdm_for_late_random_quants,GOI_dpdm_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. melanogaster","Late")))

dp_GOI <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% genes_of_interest)]

dc_GOI <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_GOI$gene)]

dp_GOI <- dp_GOI[dp_GOI$gene %in% dc_GOI$gene]

GOI_dpdc_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dp_GOI$estimate_log2, dc_GOI$estimate_log2)

GOI_dpdc_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dp_GOI$estimate_log2)))

GOI_dpdc_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(GOI_dpdc_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

GOI_dpdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(GOI_dpdc_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdc_GOI_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(GOI_dpdc_for_early,GOI_dpdc_for_early_random_quants,GOI_dpdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. carrolli","Early")))

dp_GOI <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% genes_of_interest)]

dm_GOI <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_GOI$gene)]

dp_GOI <- dp_GOI[dp_GOI$gene %in% dm_GOI$gene]

GOI_dpdm_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dp_GOI$estimate_log2, dm_GOI$estimate_log2)

GOI_dpdm_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dp_GOI$estimate_log2)))

GOI_dpdm_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(GOI_dpdm_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

GOI_dpdm_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(GOI_dpdm_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdm_GOI_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(GOI_dpdm_for_early,GOI_dpdm_for_early_random_quants,GOI_dpdm_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. melanogaster","Early")))

###


dm_GOI <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% genes_of_interest)]

dc_GOI <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% dm_GOI$gene)]

GOI_dmdc_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dm_GOI$estimate_log2, dc_GOI$estimate_log2)

GOI_dmdc_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dm_GOI$estimate_log2)))

GOI_dmdc_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(GOI_dmdc_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

GOI_dmdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(GOI_dmdc_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dmdc_GOI_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(GOI_dmdc_for_early,GOI_dmdc_for_early_random_quants,GOI_dmdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli /\nD. melanogaster","Early")))

dm_GOI <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% genes_of_interest)]

dc_GOI <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% dm_GOI$gene)]

GOI_dmdc_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dm_GOI$estimate_log2, dc_GOI$estimate_log2)

GOI_dmdc_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dm_GOI$estimate_log2)))

GOI_dmdc_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(GOI_dmdc_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

GOI_dmdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(GOI_dmdc_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dmdc_GOI_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(GOI_dmdc_for_late,GOI_dmdc_for_late_random_quants,GOI_dmdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli /\nD. melanogaster","Late")))


###

plotting_species_GOI <- as.data.frame(rbind(plotting_dpdc_GOI_for_early,plotting_dpdc_GOI_for_late,plotting_dpdm_GOI_for_early,plotting_dpdm_GOI_for_late,plotting_dmdc_GOI_for_early,plotting_dmdc_GOI_for_late))

colnames(plotting_species_GOI) <- c("VC","Vangle","Alpha","Alpha_c","ED","VC_LCL","VC_UCL","Alpha_LCL","Alpha_UCL","Comparison","stage")

plotting_species_GOI[1:9] <- lapply(plotting_species_GOI[1:9], as.numeric)

GOI_VC <- ggplot(plotting_species_GOI, aes(x = stage, y = VC)) +
  facet_wrap(~Comparison) +
  ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = VC_LCL, ymax = VC_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Foreleg\nvector correlation") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  xlab(NULL) +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))


GOI_Mag <- ggplot(plotting_species_GOI, aes(x = stage, y = Alpha)) +
  facet_wrap(~Comparison) +
  #ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = Alpha_LCL, ymax = Alpha_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Change in foreleg\n vector magnitude") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))


(GOI_VC)/(GOI_Mag)

```

Male genes

```{r}
dp_MGOI <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% male_genes)]

dc_MGOI <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% dp_MGOI$gene)]

dp_MGOI <- dp_MGOI[dp_MGOI$gene %in% dc_MGOI$gene]

MGOI_dpdc_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dp_MGOI$estimate_log2, dc_MGOI$estimate_log2)

MGOI_dpdc_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dp_MGOI$estimate_log2)))

MGOI_dpdc_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(MGOI_dpdc_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
MGOI_dpdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(MGOI_dpdc_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdc_MGOI_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(MGOI_dpdc_for_late,MGOI_dpdc_for_late_random_quants,MGOI_dpdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. carrolli","Late")))

dp_MGOI <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% male_genes)]

dm_MGOI <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% dp_MGOI$gene)]

dp_MGOI <- dp_MGOI[dp_MGOI$gene %in% dm_MGOI$gene]

MGOI_dpdm_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dp_MGOI$estimate_log2, dm_MGOI$estimate_log2)

MGOI_dpdm_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dp_MGOI$estimate_log2)))

MGOI_dpdm_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(MGOI_dpdm_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

MGOI_dpdm_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(MGOI_dpdm_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdm_MGOI_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(MGOI_dpdm_for_late,MGOI_dpdm_for_late_random_quants,MGOI_dpdm_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. melanogaster","Late")))

dp_MGOI <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% male_genes)]

dc_MGOI <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_MGOI$gene)]

dp_MGOI <- dp_MGOI[dp_MGOI$gene %in% dc_MGOI$gene]

MGOI_dpdc_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dp_MGOI$estimate_log2, dc_MGOI$estimate_log2)

MGOI_dpdc_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dp_MGOI$estimate_log2)))

MGOI_dpdc_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(MGOI_dpdc_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

MGOI_dpdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(MGOI_dpdc_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdc_MGOI_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(MGOI_dpdc_for_early,MGOI_dpdc_for_early_random_quants,MGOI_dpdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. carrolli","Early")))

dp_MGOI <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% male_genes)]

dm_MGOI <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_MGOI$gene)]

dp_MGOI <- dp_MGOI[dp_MGOI$gene %in% dm_MGOI$gene]

MGOI_dpdm_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dp_MGOI$estimate_log2, dm_MGOI$estimate_log2)

MGOI_dpdm_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dp_MGOI$estimate_log2)))

MGOI_dpdm_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(MGOI_dpdm_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

MGOI_dpdm_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(MGOI_dpdm_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdm_MGOI_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(MGOI_dpdm_for_early,MGOI_dpdm_for_early_random_quants,MGOI_dpdm_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. melanogaster","Early")))

###


dm_MGOI <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% male_genes)]

dc_MGOI <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% dm_MGOI$gene)]

MGOI_dmdc_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dm_MGOI$estimate_log2, dc_MGOI$estimate_log2)

MGOI_dmdc_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dm_MGOI$estimate_log2)))

MGOI_dmdc_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(MGOI_dmdc_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

MGOI_dmdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(MGOI_dmdc_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dmdc_MGOI_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(MGOI_dmdc_for_early,MGOI_dmdc_for_early_random_quants,MGOI_dmdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli /\nD. melanogaster","Early")))

dm_MGOI <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% male_genes)]

dc_MGOI <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% dm_MGOI$gene)]

MGOI_dmdc_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dm_MGOI$estimate_log2, dc_MGOI$estimate_log2)

MGOI_dmdc_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dm_MGOI$estimate_log2)))

MGOI_dmdc_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(MGOI_dmdc_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

MGOI_dmdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(MGOI_dmdc_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dmdc_MGOI_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(MGOI_dmdc_for_late,MGOI_dmdc_for_late_random_quants,MGOI_dmdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli /\nD. melanogaster","Late")))


###

plotting_species_MGOI <- as.data.frame(rbind(plotting_dpdc_MGOI_for_early,plotting_dpdc_MGOI_for_late,plotting_dpdm_MGOI_for_early,plotting_dpdm_MGOI_for_late,plotting_dmdc_MGOI_for_early,plotting_dmdc_MGOI_for_late))

colnames(plotting_species_MGOI) <- c("VC","Vangle","Alpha","Alpha_c","ED","VC_LCL","VC_UCL","Alpha_LCL","Alpha_UCL","Comparison","stage")

plotting_species_MGOI[1:9] <- lapply(plotting_species_MGOI[1:9], as.numeric)

MGOI_VC <- ggplot(plotting_species_MGOI, aes(x = stage, y = VC)) +
  facet_wrap(~Comparison) +
  ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = VC_LCL, ymax = VC_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Foreleg\nvector correlation") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  xlab(NULL) +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

MGOI_Mag <- ggplot(plotting_species_MGOI, aes(x = stage, y = Alpha)) +
  facet_wrap(~Comparison) +
  #ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = Alpha_LCL, ymax = Alpha_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Change in foreleg\nvector magnitude") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

(MGOI_VC)/(MGOI_Mag)

```

Female genes

```{r}
dp_FGOI <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% female_genes)]

dc_FGOI <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% dp_FGOI$gene)]

dp_FGOI <- dp_FGOI[dp_FGOI$gene %in% dc_FGOI$gene]

FGOI_dpdc_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dp_FGOI$estimate_log2, dc_FGOI$estimate_log2)

FGOI_dpdc_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dp_FGOI$estimate_log2)))

FGOI_dpdc_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(FGOI_dpdc_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
FGOI_dpdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(FGOI_dpdc_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdc_FGOI_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(FGOI_dpdc_for_late,FGOI_dpdc_for_late_random_quants,FGOI_dpdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. carrolli","Late")))

dp_FGOI <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% female_genes)]

dm_FGOI <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% dp_FGOI$gene)]

dp_FGOI <- dp_FGOI[dp_FGOI$gene %in% dm_FGOI$gene]

FGOI_dpdm_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dp_FGOI$estimate_log2, dm_FGOI$estimate_log2)

FGOI_dpdm_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dp_FGOI$estimate_log2)))

FGOI_dpdm_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(FGOI_dpdm_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

FGOI_dpdm_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(FGOI_dpdm_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdm_FGOI_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(FGOI_dpdm_for_late,FGOI_dpdm_for_late_random_quants,FGOI_dpdm_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. melanogaster","Late")))

dp_FGOI <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% female_genes)]

dc_FGOI <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_FGOI$gene)]

dp_FGOI <- dp_FGOI[dp_FGOI$gene %in% dc_FGOI$gene]

FGOI_dpdc_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dp_FGOI$estimate_log2, dc_FGOI$estimate_log2)

FGOI_dpdc_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dp_FGOI$estimate_log2)))

FGOI_dpdc_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(FGOI_dpdc_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

FGOI_dpdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(FGOI_dpdc_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdc_FGOI_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(FGOI_dpdc_for_early,FGOI_dpdc_for_early_random_quants,FGOI_dpdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. carrolli","Early")))

dp_FGOI <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% female_genes)]

dm_FGOI <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_FGOI$gene)]

dp_FGOI <- dp_FGOI[dp_FGOI$gene %in% dm_FGOI$gene]

FGOI_dpdm_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dp_FGOI$estimate_log2, dm_FGOI$estimate_log2)

FGOI_dpdm_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dp_FGOI$estimate_log2)))

FGOI_dpdm_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(FGOI_dpdm_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

FGOI_dpdm_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(FGOI_dpdm_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdm_FGOI_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(FGOI_dpdm_for_early,FGOI_dpdm_for_early_random_quants,FGOI_dpdm_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. melanogaster","Early")))

###


dm_FGOI <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% female_genes)]

dc_FGOI <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% dm_FGOI$gene)]

FGOI_dmdc_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dm_FGOI$estimate_log2, dc_FGOI$estimate_log2)

FGOI_dmdc_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dm_FGOI$estimate_log2)))

FGOI_dmdc_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(FGOI_dmdc_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

FGOI_dmdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(FGOI_dmdc_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dmdc_FGOI_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(FGOI_dmdc_for_early,FGOI_dmdc_for_early_random_quants,FGOI_dmdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli /\nD. melanogaster","Early")))

dm_FGOI <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% female_genes)]

dc_FGOI <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% dm_FGOI$gene)]

FGOI_dmdc_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dm_FGOI$estimate_log2, dc_FGOI$estimate_log2)

FGOI_dmdc_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dm_FGOI$estimate_log2)))

FGOI_dmdc_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(FGOI_dmdc_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

FGOI_dmdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(FGOI_dmdc_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dmdc_FGOI_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(FGOI_dmdc_for_late,FGOI_dmdc_for_late_random_quants,FGOI_dmdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli /\nD. melanogaster","Late")))


###

plotting_species_FGOI <- as.data.frame(rbind(plotting_dpdc_FGOI_for_early,plotting_dpdc_FGOI_for_late,plotting_dpdm_FGOI_for_early,plotting_dpdm_FGOI_for_late,plotting_dmdc_FGOI_for_early,plotting_dmdc_FGOI_for_late))

colnames(plotting_species_FGOI) <- c("VC","Vangle","Alpha","Alpha_c","ED","VC_LCL","VC_UCL","Alpha_LCL","Alpha_UCL","Comparison","stage")

plotting_species_FGOI[1:9] <- lapply(plotting_species_FGOI[1:9], as.numeric)

FGOI_VC <- ggplot(plotting_species_FGOI, aes(x = stage, y = VC)) +
  facet_wrap(~Comparison) +
  ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = VC_LCL, ymax = VC_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Foreleg\nvector correlation") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  xlab(NULL) +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

FGOI_Mag <- ggplot(plotting_species_FGOI, aes(x = stage, y = Alpha)) +
  facet_wrap(~Comparison) +
  #ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = Alpha_LCL, ymax = Alpha_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Change in foreleg\nvector magnitude") +
  xlab("Developmental stage")

(FGOI_VC)/(FGOI_Mag)

```


To confirm that this magnitude effect is not simply a product of our filtering for differentially expressed genes in D. prolongata, I will find 'genes of interest' in the same way for D. melanogaster and repeat the analysis.


```{r}

dm_dbl <- dm[dm$LCL_log2 > 1 & dm$UCL_log2 > 1 | dm$LCL_log2 < -1 & dm$UCL_log2 < -1]

dm_dbl_for <- dm_dbl[leg == "for"]
dm_dbl_mid <- dm_dbl[leg == "mid"]
dm_genes_of_interest <- dm_dbl_for$gene[-which(dm_dbl_for$gene %in% dm_dbl_mid$gene)]


dp_GOI <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% dm_genes_of_interest)]

dc_GOI <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% dp_GOI$gene)]

dp_GOI <- dp_GOI[dp_GOI$gene %in% dc_GOI$gene]

GOI_dpdc_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dp_GOI$estimate_log2, dc_GOI$estimate_log2)

GOI_dpdc_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dp_GOI$estimate_log2)))

GOI_dpdc_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(GOI_dpdc_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
GOI_dpdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(GOI_dpdc_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdc_GOI_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(GOI_dpdc_for_late,GOI_dpdc_for_late_random_quants,GOI_dpdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. carrolli","Late")))

dp_GOI <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% dm_genes_of_interest)]

dm_GOI <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% dp_GOI$gene)]

dp_GOI <- dp_GOI[dp_GOI$gene %in% dm_GOI$gene]

GOI_dpdm_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dp_GOI$estimate_log2, dm_GOI$estimate_log2)

GOI_dpdm_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dp_GOI$estimate_log2)))

GOI_dpdm_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(GOI_dpdm_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

GOI_dpdm_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(GOI_dpdm_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdm_GOI_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(GOI_dpdm_for_late,GOI_dpdm_for_late_random_quants,GOI_dpdm_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. melanogaster","Late")))

dp_GOI <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% dm_genes_of_interest)]

dc_GOI <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_GOI$gene)]

dp_GOI <- dp_GOI[dp_GOI$gene %in% dc_GOI$gene]

GOI_dpdc_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dp_GOI$estimate_log2, dc_GOI$estimate_log2)

GOI_dpdc_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dp_GOI$estimate_log2)))

GOI_dpdc_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(GOI_dpdc_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

GOI_dpdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(GOI_dpdc_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdc_GOI_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(GOI_dpdc_for_early,GOI_dpdc_for_early_random_quants,GOI_dpdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. carrolli","Early")))

dp_GOI <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% dm_genes_of_interest)]

dm_GOI <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_GOI$gene)]

dp_GOI <- dp_GOI[dp_GOI$gene %in% dm_GOI$gene]

GOI_dpdm_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dp_GOI$estimate_log2, dm_GOI$estimate_log2)

GOI_dpdm_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dp_GOI$estimate_log2)))

GOI_dpdm_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(GOI_dpdm_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

GOI_dpdm_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(GOI_dpdm_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdm_GOI_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(GOI_dpdm_for_early,GOI_dpdm_for_early_random_quants,GOI_dpdm_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. melanogaster","Early")))

###


dm_GOI <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% dm_genes_of_interest)]

dc_GOI <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% dm_GOI$gene)]

GOI_dmdc_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dm_GOI$estimate_log2, dc_GOI$estimate_log2)

GOI_dmdc_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dm_GOI$estimate_log2)))

GOI_dmdc_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(GOI_dmdc_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

GOI_dmdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(GOI_dmdc_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dmdc_GOI_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(GOI_dmdc_for_early,GOI_dmdc_for_early_random_quants,GOI_dmdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli /\nD. melanogaster","Early")))

dm_GOI <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% dm_genes_of_interest)]

dc_GOI <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% dm_GOI$gene)]

GOI_dmdc_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dm_GOI$estimate_log2, dc_GOI$estimate_log2)

GOI_dmdc_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dm_GOI$estimate_log2)))

GOI_dmdc_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(GOI_dmdc_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

GOI_dmdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(GOI_dmdc_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dmdc_GOI_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(GOI_dmdc_for_late,GOI_dmdc_for_late_random_quants,GOI_dmdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli /\nD. melanogaster","Late")))


###

plotting_species_GOI <- as.data.frame(rbind(plotting_dpdc_GOI_for_early,plotting_dpdc_GOI_for_late,plotting_dpdm_GOI_for_early,plotting_dpdm_GOI_for_late,plotting_dmdc_GOI_for_early,plotting_dmdc_GOI_for_late))

colnames(plotting_species_GOI) <- c("VC","Vangle","Alpha","Alpha_c","ED","VC_LCL","VC_UCL","Alpha_LCL","Alpha_UCL","Comparison","stage")

plotting_species_GOI[1:9] <- lapply(plotting_species_GOI[1:9], as.numeric)

GOI_VC <- ggplot(plotting_species_GOI, aes(x = stage, y = VC)) +
  facet_wrap(~Comparison) +
  ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = VC_LCL, ymax = VC_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Foreleg\nvector correlation") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  xlab(NULL) +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

GOI_Mag <- ggplot(plotting_species_GOI, aes(x = stage, y = Alpha)) +
  facet_wrap(~Comparison) +
  #ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = Alpha_LCL, ymax = Alpha_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Change in foreleg\nvector magnitude") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

(GOI_VC)/(GOI_Mag)

```

Insulin signalling in the foreleg at both developmental stages between prolongata and the other two species

```{r}
dp_INS <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% INS_genes)]

dc_INS <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% dp_INS$gene)]

dp_INS <- dp_INS[dp_INS$gene %in% dc_INS$gene]

INS_dpdc_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dp_INS$estimate_log2, dc_INS$estimate_log2)

INS_dpdc_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                    vec2 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                    sig_vec = dp_INS$estimate_log2)))

INS_dpdc_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(INS_dpdc_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
INS_dpdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(INS_dpdc_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdc_INS_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(INS_dpdc_for_late,INS_dpdc_for_late_random_quants,INS_dpdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. carrolli","Late")))

dp_INS <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% INS_genes)]

dm_INS <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% dp_INS$gene)]

dp_INS <- dp_INS[dp_INS$gene %in% dm_INS$gene]

INS_dpdm_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dp_INS$estimate_log2, dm_INS$estimate_log2)

INS_dpdm_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                    vec2 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                    sig_vec = dp_INS$estimate_log2)))

INS_dpdm_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(INS_dpdm_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

INS_dpdm_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(INS_dpdm_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdm_INS_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(INS_dpdm_for_late,INS_dpdm_for_late_random_quants,INS_dpdm_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. melanogaster","Late")))

dp_INS <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% INS_genes)]

dc_INS <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_INS$gene)]

dp_INS <- dp_INS[dp_INS$gene %in% dc_INS$gene]

INS_dpdc_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dp_INS$estimate_log2, dc_INS$estimate_log2)

INS_dpdc_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                    vec2 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                    sig_vec = dp_INS$estimate_log2)))

INS_dpdc_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(INS_dpdc_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

INS_dpdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(INS_dpdc_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdc_INS_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(INS_dpdc_for_early,INS_dpdc_for_early_random_quants,INS_dpdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. carrolli","Early")))

dp_INS <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% INS_genes)]

dm_INS <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_INS$gene)]

dp_INS <- dp_INS[dp_INS$gene %in% dm_INS$gene]

INS_dpdm_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dp_INS$estimate_log2, dm_INS$estimate_log2)

INS_dpdm_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                    vec2 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                    sig_vec = dp_INS$estimate_log2)))

INS_dpdm_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(INS_dpdm_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

INS_dpdm_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(INS_dpdm_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdm_INS_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(INS_dpdm_for_early,INS_dpdm_for_early_random_quants,INS_dpdm_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. melanogaster","Early")))

###


dm_INS <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% INS_genes)]

dc_INS <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% dm_INS$gene)]

INS_dmdc_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dm_INS$estimate_log2, dc_INS$estimate_log2)

INS_dmdc_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dm_INS$estimate_log2)))

INS_dmdc_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(INS_dmdc_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

INS_dmdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(INS_dmdc_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dmdc_INS_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(INS_dmdc_for_early,INS_dmdc_for_early_random_quants,INS_dmdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli /\nD. melanogaster","Early")))

dm_INS <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% INS_genes)]

dc_INS <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% dm_INS$gene)]

INS_dmdc_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dm_INS$estimate_log2, dc_INS$estimate_log2)

INS_dmdc_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dm_INS$estimate_log2)))

INS_dmdc_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(INS_dmdc_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

INS_dmdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(INS_dmdc_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dmdc_INS_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(INS_dmdc_for_late,INS_dmdc_for_late_random_quants,INS_dmdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli /\nD. melanogaster","Late")))


###

plotting_species_INS <- as.data.frame(rbind(plotting_dpdc_INS_for_early,plotting_dpdc_INS_for_late,plotting_dpdm_INS_for_early,plotting_dpdm_INS_for_late,plotting_dmdc_INS_for_early,plotting_dmdc_INS_for_late))

colnames(plotting_species_INS) <- c("VC","Vangle","Alpha","Alpha_c","ED","VC_LCL","VC_UCL","Alpha_LCL","Alpha_UCL","Comparison","stage")

plotting_species_INS[1:9] <- lapply(plotting_species_INS[1:9], as.numeric)

INS_VC_spc <- ggplot(plotting_species_INS, aes(x = stage, y = VC)) +
  facet_wrap(~Comparison) +
  ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = VC_LCL, ymax = VC_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Foreleg\nvector correlation") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  xlab(NULL) +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

INS_Mag_spc <- ggplot(plotting_species_INS, aes(x = stage, y = Alpha)) +
  facet_wrap(~Comparison) +
  #ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = Alpha_LCL, ymax = Alpha_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Change in foreleg\nvector magnitude") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

(INS_VC_spc)/(INS_Mag_spc)
```

Notch

```{r}
dp_NOTCH <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% NOTCH_genes)]

dc_NOTCH <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% dp_NOTCH$gene)]

dp_NOTCH <- dp_NOTCH[dp_NOTCH$gene %in% dc_NOTCH$gene]

NOTCH_dpdc_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dp_NOTCH$estimate_log2, dc_NOTCH$estimate_log2)

NOTCH_dpdc_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                    vec2 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                    sig_vec = dp_NOTCH$estimate_log2)))

NOTCH_dpdc_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(NOTCH_dpdc_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
NOTCH_dpdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(NOTCH_dpdc_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdc_NOTCH_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(NOTCH_dpdc_for_late,NOTCH_dpdc_for_late_random_quants,NOTCH_dpdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. carrolli","Late")))

dp_NOTCH <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% NOTCH_genes)]

dm_NOTCH <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% dp_NOTCH$gene)]

dp_NOTCH <- dp_NOTCH[dp_NOTCH$gene %in% dm_NOTCH$gene]

NOTCH_dpdm_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dp_NOTCH$estimate_log2, dm_NOTCH$estimate_log2)

NOTCH_dpdm_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                    vec2 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                    sig_vec = dp_NOTCH$estimate_log2)))

NOTCH_dpdm_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(NOTCH_dpdm_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

NOTCH_dpdm_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(NOTCH_dpdm_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdm_NOTCH_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(NOTCH_dpdm_for_late,NOTCH_dpdm_for_late_random_quants,NOTCH_dpdm_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. melanogaster","Late")))

dp_NOTCH <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% NOTCH_genes)]

dc_NOTCH <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_NOTCH$gene)]

dp_NOTCH <- dp_NOTCH[dp_NOTCH$gene %in% dc_NOTCH$gene]

NOTCH_dpdc_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dp_NOTCH$estimate_log2, dc_NOTCH$estimate_log2)

NOTCH_dpdc_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                    vec2 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                    sig_vec = dp_NOTCH$estimate_log2)))

NOTCH_dpdc_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(NOTCH_dpdc_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

NOTCH_dpdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(NOTCH_dpdc_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdc_NOTCH_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(NOTCH_dpdc_for_early,NOTCH_dpdc_for_early_random_quants,NOTCH_dpdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. carrolli","Early")))

dp_NOTCH <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% NOTCH_genes)]

dm_NOTCH <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_NOTCH$gene)]

dp_NOTCH <- dp_NOTCH[dp_NOTCH$gene %in% dm_NOTCH$gene]

NOTCH_dpdm_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dp_NOTCH$estimate_log2, dm_NOTCH$estimate_log2)

NOTCH_dpdm_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                    vec2 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                    sig_vec = dp_NOTCH$estimate_log2)))

NOTCH_dpdm_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(NOTCH_dpdm_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

NOTCH_dpdm_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(NOTCH_dpdm_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdm_NOTCH_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(NOTCH_dpdm_for_early,NOTCH_dpdm_for_early_random_quants,NOTCH_dpdm_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. melanogaster","Early")))

###


dm_NOTCH <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% NOTCH_genes)]

dc_NOTCH <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% dm_NOTCH$gene)]

NOTCH_dmdc_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dm_NOTCH$estimate_log2, dc_NOTCH$estimate_log2)

NOTCH_dmdc_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dm_NOTCH$estimate_log2)))

NOTCH_dmdc_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(NOTCH_dmdc_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

NOTCH_dmdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(NOTCH_dmdc_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dmdc_NOTCH_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(NOTCH_dmdc_for_early,NOTCH_dmdc_for_early_random_quants,NOTCH_dmdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli /\nD. melanogaster","Early")))

dm_NOTCH <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% NOTCH_genes)]

dc_NOTCH <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% dm_NOTCH$gene)]

NOTCH_dmdc_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dm_NOTCH$estimate_log2, dc_NOTCH$estimate_log2)

NOTCH_dmdc_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dm_NOTCH$estimate_log2)))

NOTCH_dmdc_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(NOTCH_dmdc_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

NOTCH_dmdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(NOTCH_dmdc_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dmdc_NOTCH_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(NOTCH_dmdc_for_late,NOTCH_dmdc_for_late_random_quants,NOTCH_dmdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli /\nD. melanogaster","Late")))


###

plotting_species_NOTCH <- as.data.frame(rbind(plotting_dpdc_NOTCH_for_early,plotting_dpdc_NOTCH_for_late,plotting_dpdm_NOTCH_for_early,plotting_dpdm_NOTCH_for_late,plotting_dmdc_NOTCH_for_early,plotting_dmdc_NOTCH_for_late))

colnames(plotting_species_NOTCH) <- c("VC","Vangle","Alpha","Alpha_c","ED","VC_LCL","VC_UCL","Alpha_LCL","Alpha_UCL","Comparison","stage")

plotting_species_NOTCH[1:9] <- lapply(plotting_species_NOTCH[1:9], as.numeric)

NOTCH_VC_spc <- ggplot(plotting_species_NOTCH, aes(x = stage, y = VC)) +
  facet_wrap(~Comparison) +
  ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = VC_LCL, ymax = VC_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Foreleg\nvector correlation") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  xlab(NULL) +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

NOTCH_Mag_spc <- ggplot(plotting_species_NOTCH, aes(x = stage, y = Alpha)) +
  facet_wrap(~Comparison) +
  #ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = Alpha_LCL, ymax = Alpha_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Change in foreleg\nvector magnitude") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

(NOTCH_VC_spc)/(NOTCH_Mag_spc)

```


EGFR signalling in the foreleg at both developmental stages between prolongata and the other two species

```{r}
dp_EGFR <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% EGFR_genes)]

dc_EGFR <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% dp_EGFR$gene)]

dp_EGFR <- dp_EGFR[dp_EGFR$gene %in% dc_EGFR$gene]

EGFR_dpdc_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dp_EGFR$estimate_log2, dc_EGFR$estimate_log2)

EGFR_dpdc_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dp_EGFR$estimate_log2)))

EGFR_dpdc_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(EGFR_dpdc_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
EGFR_dpdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(EGFR_dpdc_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdc_EGFR_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(EGFR_dpdc_for_late,EGFR_dpdc_for_late_random_quants,EGFR_dpdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. carrolli","Late")))

dp_EGFR <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% EGFR_genes)]

dm_EGFR <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% dp_EGFR$gene)]

dp_EGFR <- dp_EGFR[dp_EGFR$gene %in% dm_EGFR$gene]

EGFR_dpdm_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dp_EGFR$estimate_log2, dm_EGFR$estimate_log2)

EGFR_dpdm_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dp_EGFR$estimate_log2)))

EGFR_dpdm_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(EGFR_dpdm_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

EGFR_dpdm_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(EGFR_dpdm_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdm_EGFR_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(EGFR_dpdm_for_late,EGFR_dpdm_for_late_random_quants,EGFR_dpdm_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. melanogaster","Late")))

dp_EGFR <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% EGFR_genes)]

dc_EGFR <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_EGFR$gene)]

dp_EGFR <- dp_EGFR[dp_EGFR$gene %in% dc_EGFR$gene]

EGFR_dpdc_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dp_EGFR$estimate_log2, dc_EGFR$estimate_log2)

EGFR_dpdc_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dp_EGFR$estimate_log2)))

EGFR_dpdc_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(EGFR_dpdc_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

EGFR_dpdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(EGFR_dpdc_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdc_EGFR_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(EGFR_dpdc_for_early,EGFR_dpdc_for_early_random_quants,EGFR_dpdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. carrolli","Early")))

dp_EGFR <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% EGFR_genes)]

dm_EGFR <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_EGFR$gene)]

dp_EGFR <- dp_EGFR[dp_EGFR$gene %in% dm_EGFR$gene]

EGFR_dpdm_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dp_EGFR$estimate_log2, dm_EGFR$estimate_log2)

EGFR_dpdm_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dp_EGFR$estimate_log2)))

EGFR_dpdm_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(EGFR_dpdm_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

EGFR_dpdm_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(EGFR_dpdm_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdm_EGFR_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(EGFR_dpdm_for_early,EGFR_dpdm_for_early_random_quants,EGFR_dpdm_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. melanogaster","Early")))


dm_EGFR <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% EGFR_genes)]

dc_EGFR <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% dm_EGFR$gene)]

EGFR_dmdc_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dm_EGFR$estimate_log2, dc_EGFR$estimate_log2)

EGFR_dmdc_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dm_EGFR$estimate_log2)))

EGFR_dmdc_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(EGFR_dmdc_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

EGFR_dmdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(EGFR_dmdc_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dmdc_EGFR_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(EGFR_dmdc_for_early,EGFR_dmdc_for_early_random_quants,EGFR_dmdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli /\nD. melanogaster","Early")))

dm_EGFR <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% EGFR_genes)]

dc_EGFR <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% dm_EGFR$gene)]

EGFR_dmdc_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dm_EGFR$estimate_log2, dc_EGFR$estimate_log2)

EGFR_dmdc_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dm_EGFR$estimate_log2)))

EGFR_dmdc_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(EGFR_dmdc_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

EGFR_dmdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(EGFR_dmdc_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dmdc_EGFR_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(EGFR_dmdc_for_late,EGFR_dmdc_for_late_random_quants,EGFR_dmdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli /\nD. melanogaster","Late")))

plotting_species_EGFR <- as.data.frame(rbind(plotting_dpdc_EGFR_for_early,plotting_dpdc_EGFR_for_late,plotting_dpdm_EGFR_for_early,plotting_dpdm_EGFR_for_late,plotting_dmdc_EGFR_for_early,plotting_dmdc_EGFR_for_late))

colnames(plotting_species_EGFR) <- c("VC","Vangle","Alpha","Alpha_c","ED","VC_LCL","VC_UCL","Alpha_LCL","Alpha_UCL","Comparison","stage")

plotting_species_EGFR[1:9] <- lapply(plotting_species_EGFR[1:9], as.numeric)

EGFR_VC_spc <- ggplot(plotting_species_EGFR, aes(x = stage, y = VC)) +
  facet_wrap(~Comparison) +
  ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = VC_LCL, ymax = VC_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Foreleg\nvector correlation") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  xlab(NULL) +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

EGFR_Mag_spc <- ggplot(plotting_species_EGFR, aes(x = stage, y = Alpha)) +
  facet_wrap(~Comparison) +
  #ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = Alpha_LCL, ymax = Alpha_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Change in foreleg\nvector magnitude") +
  xlab("Developmental\nstage") +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

(EGFR_VC_spc)/(EGFR_Mag_spc)

```

SWH signalling in the foreleg at both developmental stages between prolongata and the other two species

```{r}
dp_SWH <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% SWH_genes)]

dc_SWH <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% dp_SWH$gene)]

dp_SWH <- dp_SWH[dp_SWH$gene %in% dc_SWH$gene]

SWH_dpdc_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dp_SWH$estimate_log2, dc_SWH$estimate_log2)

SWH_dpdc_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dp_SWH$estimate_log2)))

SWH_dpdc_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(SWH_dpdc_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
SWH_dpdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(SWH_dpdc_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdc_SWH_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(SWH_dpdc_for_late,SWH_dpdc_for_late_random_quants,SWH_dpdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. carrolli","Late")))

dp_SWH <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% SWH_genes)]

dm_SWH <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% dp_SWH$gene)]

dp_SWH <- dp_SWH[dp_SWH$gene %in% dm_SWH$gene]

SWH_dpdm_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dp_SWH$estimate_log2, dm_SWH$estimate_log2)

SWH_dpdm_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dp_SWH$estimate_log2)))

SWH_dpdm_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(SWH_dpdm_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

SWH_dpdm_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(SWH_dpdm_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdm_SWH_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(SWH_dpdm_for_late,SWH_dpdm_for_late_random_quants,SWH_dpdm_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. melanogaster","Late")))

dp_SWH <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% SWH_genes)]

dc_SWH <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_SWH$gene)]

dp_SWH <- dp_SWH[dp_SWH$gene %in% dc_SWH$gene]

SWH_dpdc_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dp_SWH$estimate_log2, dc_SWH$estimate_log2)

SWH_dpdc_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dp_SWH$estimate_log2)))

SWH_dpdc_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(SWH_dpdc_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

SWH_dpdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(SWH_dpdc_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdc_SWH_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(SWH_dpdc_for_early,SWH_dpdc_for_early_random_quants,SWH_dpdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. carrolli","Early")))

dp_SWH <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% SWH_genes)]

dm_SWH <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_SWH$gene)]

dp_SWH <- dp_SWH[dp_SWH$gene %in% dm_SWH$gene]

SWH_dpdm_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dp_SWH$estimate_log2, dm_SWH$estimate_log2)

SWH_dpdm_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dp_SWH$estimate_log2)))

SWH_dpdm_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(SWH_dpdm_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

SWH_dpdm_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(SWH_dpdm_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdm_SWH_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(SWH_dpdm_for_early,SWH_dpdm_for_early_random_quants,SWH_dpdm_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. melanogaster","Early")))


dm_SWH <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% SWH_genes)]

dc_SWH <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% dm_SWH$gene)]

SWH_dmdc_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dm_SWH$estimate_log2, dc_SWH$estimate_log2)

SWH_dmdc_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dm_SWH$estimate_log2)))

SWH_dmdc_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(SWH_dmdc_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

SWH_dmdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(SWH_dmdc_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dmdc_SWH_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(SWH_dmdc_for_early,SWH_dmdc_for_early_random_quants,SWH_dmdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli /\nD. melanogaster","Early")))

dm_SWH <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% SWH_genes)]

dc_SWH <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% dm_SWH$gene)]

SWH_dmdc_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dm_SWH$estimate_log2, dc_SWH$estimate_log2)

SWH_dmdc_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dm_SWH$estimate_log2)))

SWH_dmdc_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(SWH_dmdc_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

SWH_dmdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(SWH_dmdc_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dmdc_SWH_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(SWH_dmdc_for_late,SWH_dmdc_for_late_random_quants,SWH_dmdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli /\nD. melanogaster","Late")))

plotting_species_SWH <- as.data.frame(rbind(plotting_dpdc_SWH_for_early,plotting_dpdc_SWH_for_late,plotting_dpdm_SWH_for_early,plotting_dpdm_SWH_for_late,plotting_dmdc_SWH_for_early,plotting_dmdc_SWH_for_late))

colnames(plotting_species_SWH) <- c("VC","Vangle","Alpha","Alpha_c","ED","VC_LCL","VC_UCL","Alpha_LCL","Alpha_UCL","Comparison","stage")

plotting_species_SWH[1:9] <- lapply(plotting_species_SWH[1:9], as.numeric)

hippo_VC_spc <- ggplot(plotting_species_SWH, aes(x = stage, y = VC)) +
  facet_wrap(~Comparison) +
  ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = VC_LCL, ymax = VC_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Foreleg\nvector correlation") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  xlab(NULL) +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

hippo_Mag_spc <- ggplot(plotting_species_SWH, aes(x = stage, y = Alpha)) +
  facet_wrap(~Comparison) +
  #ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = Alpha_LCL, ymax = Alpha_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Change in foreleg\nvector magnitude") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

(hippo_VC_spc)/(hippo_Mag_spc)
```

WNT signalling in the foreleg at both developmental stages between prolongata and the other two species

```{r}
dp_WNT <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% WNT_genes)]

dc_WNT <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% dp_WNT$gene)]

dp_WNT <- dp_WNT[dp_WNT$gene %in% dc_WNT$gene]

WNT_dpdc_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dp_WNT$estimate_log2, dc_WNT$estimate_log2)

WNT_dpdc_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dp_WNT$estimate_log2)))

WNT_dpdc_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(WNT_dpdc_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
WNT_dpdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(WNT_dpdc_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdc_WNT_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(WNT_dpdc_for_late,WNT_dpdc_for_late_random_quants,WNT_dpdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. carrolli","Late")))

dp_WNT <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% WNT_genes)]

dm_WNT <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% dp_WNT$gene)]

dp_WNT <- dp_WNT[dp_WNT$gene %in% dm_WNT$gene]

WNT_dpdm_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dp_WNT$estimate_log2, dm_WNT$estimate_log2)

WNT_dpdm_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dp_WNT$estimate_log2)))

WNT_dpdm_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(WNT_dpdm_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

WNT_dpdm_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(WNT_dpdm_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdm_WNT_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(WNT_dpdm_for_late,WNT_dpdm_for_late_random_quants,WNT_dpdm_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. melanogaster","Late")))

dp_WNT <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% WNT_genes)]

dc_WNT <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_WNT$gene)]

dp_WNT <- dp_WNT[dp_WNT$gene %in% dc_WNT$gene]

WNT_dpdc_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dp_WNT$estimate_log2, dc_WNT$estimate_log2)

WNT_dpdc_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dp_WNT$estimate_log2)))

WNT_dpdc_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(WNT_dpdc_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

WNT_dpdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(WNT_dpdc_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdc_WNT_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(WNT_dpdc_for_early,WNT_dpdc_for_early_random_quants,WNT_dpdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. carrolli","Early")))

dp_WNT <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% WNT_genes)]

dm_WNT <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_WNT$gene)]

dp_WNT <- dp_WNT[dp_WNT$gene %in% dm_WNT$gene]

WNT_dpdm_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dp_WNT$estimate_log2, dm_WNT$estimate_log2)

WNT_dpdm_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dp_WNT$estimate_log2)))

WNT_dpdm_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(WNT_dpdm_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

WNT_dpdm_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(WNT_dpdm_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdm_WNT_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(WNT_dpdm_for_early,WNT_dpdm_for_early_random_quants,WNT_dpdm_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. melanogaster","Early")))



dm_WNT <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% WNT_genes)]

dc_WNT <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% dm_WNT$gene)]

WNT_dmdc_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dm_WNT$estimate_log2, dc_WNT$estimate_log2)

WNT_dmdc_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dm_WNT$estimate_log2)))

WNT_dmdc_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(WNT_dmdc_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

WNT_dmdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(WNT_dmdc_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dmdc_WNT_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(WNT_dmdc_for_early,WNT_dmdc_for_early_random_quants,WNT_dmdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli /\nD. melanogaster","Early")))

dm_WNT <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% WNT_genes)]

dc_WNT <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% dm_WNT$gene)]

WNT_dmdc_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dm_WNT$estimate_log2, dc_WNT$estimate_log2)

WNT_dmdc_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dm_WNT$estimate_log2)))

WNT_dmdc_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(WNT_dmdc_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

WNT_dmdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(WNT_dmdc_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dmdc_WNT_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(WNT_dmdc_for_late,WNT_dmdc_for_late_random_quants,WNT_dmdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli /\nD. melanogaster","Late")))

plotting_species_WNT <- as.data.frame(rbind(plotting_dpdc_WNT_for_early,plotting_dpdc_WNT_for_late,plotting_dpdm_WNT_for_early,plotting_dpdm_WNT_for_late,plotting_dmdc_WNT_for_early,plotting_dmdc_WNT_for_late))

colnames(plotting_species_WNT) <- c("VC","Vangle","Alpha","Alpha_c","ED","VC_LCL","VC_UCL","Alpha_LCL","Alpha_UCL","Comparison","stage")

plotting_species_WNT[1:9] <- lapply(plotting_species_WNT[1:9], as.numeric)

WNT_VC_spc <- ggplot(plotting_species_WNT, aes(x = stage, y = VC)) +
  facet_wrap(~Comparison) +
  ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = VC_LCL, ymax = VC_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Foreleg\nvector correlation") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  xlab(NULL) +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

WNT_Mag_spc <- ggplot(plotting_species_WNT, aes(x = stage, y = Alpha_c)) +
  facet_wrap(~Comparison) +
  #ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = Alpha_LCL, ymax = Alpha_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Change in foreleg\nvector magnitude") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

(WNT_VC_spc)/(WNT_Mag_spc)
```

BMP signalling in the foreleg at both developmental stages between prolongata and the other two species

```{r}
dp_BMP <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% BMP_genes)]

dc_BMP <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% dp_BMP$gene)]

dp_BMP <- dp_BMP[dp_BMP$gene %in% dc_BMP$gene]

BMP_dpdc_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dp_BMP$estimate_log2, dc_BMP$estimate_log2)

BMP_dpdc_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dp_BMP$estimate_log2)))

BMP_dpdc_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(BMP_dpdc_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
BMP_dpdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(BMP_dpdc_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdc_BMP_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(BMP_dpdc_for_late,BMP_dpdc_for_late_random_quants,BMP_dpdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. carrolli","Late")))

dp_BMP <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% BMP_genes)]

dm_BMP <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% dp_BMP$gene)]

dp_BMP <- dp_BMP[dp_BMP$gene %in% dm_BMP$gene]

BMP_dpdm_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dp_BMP$estimate_log2, dm_BMP$estimate_log2)

BMP_dpdm_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dp_BMP$estimate_log2)))

BMP_dpdm_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(BMP_dpdm_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

BMP_dpdm_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(BMP_dpdm_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdm_BMP_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(BMP_dpdm_for_late,BMP_dpdm_for_late_random_quants,BMP_dpdm_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. melanogaster","Late")))

dp_BMP <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% BMP_genes)]

dc_BMP <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_BMP$gene)]

dp_BMP <- dp_BMP[dp_BMP$gene %in% dc_BMP$gene]

BMP_dpdc_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dp_BMP$estimate_log2, dc_BMP$estimate_log2)

BMP_dpdc_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
```
