```{r}
                                                             sig_vec = dp_BMP$estimate_log2)))

BMP_dpdc_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(BMP_dpdc_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

BMP_dpdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(BMP_dpdc_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdc_BMP_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(BMP_dpdc_for_early,BMP_dpdc_for_early_random_quants,BMP_dpdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. carrolli","Early")))

dp_BMP <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% BMP_genes)]

dm_BMP <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_BMP$gene)]

dp_BMP <- dp_BMP[dp_BMP$gene %in% dm_BMP$gene]

BMP_dpdm_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dp_BMP$estimate_log2, dm_BMP$estimate_log2)

BMP_dpdm_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dp_BMP$estimate_log2)))

BMP_dpdm_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(BMP_dpdm_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

BMP_dpdm_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(BMP_dpdm_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdm_BMP_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(BMP_dpdm_for_early,BMP_dpdm_for_early_random_quants,BMP_dpdm_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. melanogaster","Early")))


dm_BMP <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% BMP_genes)]

dc_BMP <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% dm_BMP$gene)]

BMP_dmdc_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dm_BMP$estimate_log2, dc_BMP$estimate_log2)

BMP_dmdc_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dm_BMP$estimate_log2)))

BMP_dmdc_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(BMP_dmdc_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

BMP_dmdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(BMP_dmdc_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dmdc_BMP_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(BMP_dmdc_for_early,BMP_dmdc_for_early_random_quants,BMP_dmdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli /\nD. melanogaster","Early")))

dm_BMP <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% BMP_genes)]

dc_BMP <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% dm_BMP$gene)]

BMP_dmdc_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dm_BMP$estimate_log2, dc_BMP$estimate_log2)

BMP_dmdc_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dm_BMP$estimate_log2)))

BMP_dmdc_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(BMP_dmdc_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

BMP_dmdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(BMP_dmdc_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dmdc_BMP_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(BMP_dmdc_for_late,BMP_dmdc_for_late_random_quants,BMP_dmdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli /\nD. melanogaster","Late")))

plotting_species_BMP <- as.data.frame(rbind(plotting_dpdc_BMP_for_early,plotting_dpdc_BMP_for_late,plotting_dpdm_BMP_for_early,plotting_dpdm_BMP_for_late,plotting_dmdc_BMP_for_early,plotting_dmdc_BMP_for_late))

colnames(plotting_species_BMP) <- c("VC","Vangle","Alpha","Alpha_c","ED","VC_LCL","VC_UCL","Alpha_LCL","Alpha_UCL","Comparison","stage")

plotting_species_BMP[1:9] <- lapply(plotting_species_BMP[1:9], as.numeric)

BMP_VC_spc <- ggplot(plotting_species_BMP, aes(x = stage, y = VC)) +
  facet_wrap(~Comparison) +
  ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = VC_LCL, ymax = VC_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Foreleg\nvector correlation") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  xlab(NULL) +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

BMP_Mag_spc <- ggplot(plotting_species_BMP, aes(x = stage, y = Alpha)) +
  facet_wrap(~Comparison) +
  #ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = Alpha_LCL, ymax = Alpha_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Change in foreleg\nvector magnitude") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

(BMP_VC_spc)/(BMP_Mag_spc)
```

HH signalling in the foreleg at both developmental stages between prolongata and the other two species

```{r}
dp_HH <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% HH_genes)]

dc_HH <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% dp_HH$gene)]

dp_HH <- dp_HH[dp_HH$gene %in% dc_HH$gene]

HH_dpdc_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dp_HH$estimate_log2, dc_HH$estimate_log2)

HH_dpdc_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dp_HH$estimate_log2)))

HH_dpdc_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(HH_dpdc_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
HH_dpdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(HH_dpdc_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdc_HH_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(HH_dpdc_for_late,HH_dpdc_for_late_random_quants,HH_dpdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. carrolli","Late")))

dp_HH <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% HH_genes)]

dm_HH <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% dp_HH$gene)]

dp_HH <- dp_HH[dp_HH$gene %in% dm_HH$gene]

HH_dpdm_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dp_HH$estimate_log2, dm_HH$estimate_log2)

HH_dpdm_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dp_HH$estimate_log2)))

HH_dpdm_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(HH_dpdm_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

HH_dpdm_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(HH_dpdm_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdm_HH_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(HH_dpdm_for_late,HH_dpdm_for_late_random_quants,HH_dpdm_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. melanogaster","Late")))

dp_HH <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% HH_genes)]

dc_HH <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_HH$gene)]

dp_HH <- dp_HH[dp_HH$gene %in% dc_HH$gene]

HH_dpdc_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dp_HH$estimate_log2, dc_HH$estimate_log2)

HH_dpdc_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dp_HH$estimate_log2)))

HH_dpdc_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(HH_dpdc_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

HH_dpdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(HH_dpdc_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdc_HH_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(HH_dpdc_for_early,HH_dpdc_for_early_random_quants,HH_dpdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. carrolli","Early")))

dp_HH <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% HH_genes)]

dm_HH <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_HH$gene)]

dp_HH <- dp_HH[dp_HH$gene %in% dm_HH$gene]

HH_dpdm_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dp_HH$estimate_log2, dm_HH$estimate_log2)

HH_dpdm_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dp_HH$estimate_log2)))

HH_dpdm_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(HH_dpdm_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

HH_dpdm_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(HH_dpdm_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdm_HH_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(HH_dpdm_for_early,HH_dpdm_for_early_random_quants,HH_dpdm_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. melanogaster","Early")))


dm_HH <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% HH_genes)]

dc_HH <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% dm_HH$gene)]

HH_dmdc_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dm_HH$estimate_log2, dc_HH$estimate_log2)

HH_dmdc_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dm_HH$estimate_log2)))

HH_dmdc_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(HH_dmdc_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

HH_dmdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(HH_dmdc_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dmdc_HH_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(HH_dmdc_for_early,HH_dmdc_for_early_random_quants,HH_dmdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli /\nD. melanogaster","Early")))

dm_HH <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% HH_genes)]

dc_HH <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% dm_HH$gene)]

HH_dmdc_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dm_HH$estimate_log2, dc_HH$estimate_log2)

HH_dmdc_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dm_HH$estimate_log2)))

HH_dmdc_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(HH_dmdc_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

HH_dmdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(HH_dmdc_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dmdc_HH_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(HH_dmdc_for_late,HH_dmdc_for_late_random_quants,HH_dmdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli /\nD. melanogaster","Late")))

plotting_species_HH <- as.data.frame(rbind(plotting_dpdc_HH_for_early,plotting_dpdc_HH_for_late,plotting_dpdm_HH_for_early,plotting_dpdm_HH_for_late,plotting_dmdc_HH_for_early,plotting_dmdc_HH_for_late))

colnames(plotting_species_HH) <- c("VC","Vangle","Alpha","Alpha_c","ED","VC_LCL","VC_UCL","Alpha_LCL","Alpha_UCL","Comparison","stage")

plotting_species_HH[1:9] <- lapply(plotting_species_HH[1:9], as.numeric)

HH_VC_spc <- ggplot(plotting_species_HH, aes(x = stage, y = VC)) +
  facet_wrap(~Comparison) +
  ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = VC_LCL, ymax = VC_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Foreleg vector correlation") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  xlab(NULL) +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

HH_Mag_spc <- ggplot(plotting_species_HH, aes(x = stage, y = Alpha_c)) +
  facet_wrap(~Comparison) +
  #ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = Alpha_LCL, ymax = Alpha_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Change in foreleg/nvector magnitude") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

(HH_VC_spc)/(HH_Mag_spc)

```

I want to look for changes in grain targets between early and late third instar

```{r}
# within D. prolongata, foreleg late vs midleg late correlations

# LF2 genes in the foreleg
dp_grn_for_late_VC <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% grn_targets$V1),]

# 2LFC genes from the forelegs, but their expression in the midlegs
dp_grn_mid_late_VC <- dp_subset_mid_late[which(dp_subset_mid_late$gene %in% grn_targets$V1),]

dp_grn_for_late_VC[which(dp_grn_for_late_VC$gene %in% dp_grn_mid_late_VC$gene),]$gene

dp_grn_mid_late_VC[which(dp_grn_mid_late_VC$gene %in% dp_grn_for_late_VC$gene),]$gene

# vector correlation of the 2LFC foreleg late genes in foreleg vs. midleg
VC_dp_late_forVmid_grn <- ang.vec.alph(dp_grn_for_late_VC$estimate_log2, dp_grn_mid_late_VC$estimate_log2)

dp_late_forVmid_random_grn <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(
  vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
  # vector of LFC genes for midleg
  vec2 = dp_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
  # vector that is the length of the vectors used for the correlations
  sig_vec = dp_grn_for_late_VC$estimate_log2)))

# whats the distribution of these random draws?
#hist(dp_late_forVmid_random_grn[,1], breaks = 50)
#hist(dp_late_forVmid_random_grn[,4], breaks = 50)
# There seems to be a strange peak at really high correlation that may be pulling the upper limit higher?

# 95% quantiles on the random 10000 permutations
dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_grn <- quantile(dp_late_forVmid_random_grn[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_alpha_grn <- quantile(dp_late_forVmid_random_grn[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting
plotting_VC_dp_late_forVmid_grn <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dp_late_forVmid_grn,dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_grn,dp_late_forVmid_random_quants_alpha_grn,"D. prolongata","Late")))

#



#

# within D. prolongata, foreleg early vs midleg early correlations

dp_grn_for_early_VC <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% grn_targets$V1),]

dp_grn_mid_early_VC <- dp_subset_mid_early[which(dp_subset_mid_early$gene %in% grn_targets$V1),]

dp_early_forVmid_grn <- ang.vec.alph(dp_grn_for_early_VC$estimate_log2, dp_grn_mid_early_VC$estimate_log2)


#dp_subset_for_early_temp <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_subset_mid_early$gene)]

dp_early_forVmid_random_grn <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(
  vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
  vec2 = dp_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
  sig_vec = dp_grn_for_early_VC$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dp_early_forVmid_random_grn[,1], breaks = 50)

dp_early_for_random_quants_grn <- quantile(dp_early_forVmid_random_grn[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
dp_early_for_random_quants_alpha_grn <- quantile(dp_early_forVmid_random_grn[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_VC_dp_early_forVmid_grn <- as.data.frame(t(c(dp_early_forVmid_grn,dp_early_for_random_quants_grn,dp_early_for_random_quants_alpha_grn,"D. prolongata","Early")))
#
#
#

# within D. carrolli, foreleg late vs midleg late correlations

dc_grn_for_late_VC <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% grn_targets$V1),]

dc_grn_mid_late_VC <- dc_subset_mid_late[which(dc_subset_mid_late$gene %in% grn_targets$V1),]

VC_dc_late_forVmid_grn <- ang.vec.alph(dc_grn_for_late_VC$estimate_log2, dc_grn_mid_late_VC$estimate_log2)

dc_late_forVmid_random_grn <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(
  vec1 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
  vec2 = dc_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
  sig_vec = dc_grn_for_late_VC$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dc_late_forVmid_random_grn[,1], breaks = 50)

dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_grn <- quantile(dc_late_forVmid_random_grn[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_alpha_grn <- quantile(dc_late_forVmid_random_grn[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting

plotting_VC_dc_late_forVmid_grn <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dc_late_forVmid_grn,dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_grn,dc_late_forVmid_random_quants_alpha_grn,"D. carrolli","Late")))
#



#

# within D. carrolli, foreleg early vs midleg early correlations

dc_grn_for_early_VC <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% grn_targets$V1),]

dc_grn_mid_early_VC <- dc_subset_mid_early[which(dc_subset_mid_early$gene %in% grn_targets$V1),]

dc_early_forVmid_grn <- ang.vec.alph(dc_grn_for_early_VC$estimate_log2, dc_grn_mid_early_VC$estimate_log2)

#dp_subset_for_early_temp <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_subset_mid_early$gene)]

dc_early_forVmid_random_grn <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(
  vec1 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
  vec2 = dc_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
  sig_vec = dc_grn_for_early_VC$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dc_early_forVmid_random_grn[,1], breaks = 50)

dc_early_for_random_quants_grn <- quantile(dc_early_forVmid_random_grn[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
dc_early_for_random_quants_alpha_grn <- quantile(dc_early_forVmid_random_grn[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

#

plotting_dc_early_for_grn <- as.data.frame(t(c(dc_early_forVmid_grn,dc_early_for_random_quants_grn,dc_early_for_random_quants_alpha_grn,"D. carrolli","Early")))

#



# within D. melanogaster, foreleg late vs midleg late correlations

dm_grn_for_late_VC <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% grn_targets$V1),]

dm_grn_mid_late_VC <- dm_subset_mid_late[which(dm_subset_mid_late$gene %in% grn_targets$V1),]

VC_dm_late_forVmid_grn <- ang.vec.alph(dm_grn_for_late_VC$estimate_log2, dm_grn_mid_late_VC$estimate_log2)

dm_late_forVmid_random_grn <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(
  vec1 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
  vec2 = dm_subset_mid_late$estimate_log2,
  sig_vec = dm_grn_for_late_VC$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dm_late_forVmid_random_grn[,1], breaks = 50)

dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_grn <- quantile(dm_late_forVmid_random_grn[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_alpha_grn <- quantile(dm_late_forVmid_random_grn[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

# for plotting

plotting_VC_dm_late_forVmid_grn <- as.data.frame(t(c(VC_dm_late_forVmid_grn,dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_grn,dm_late_forVmid_random_quants_alpha_grn,"D. melanogaster","Late")))

#



#

# within D. melanogaster, foreleg early vs midleg early correlations

dm_grn_for_early_VC <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% grn_targets$V1),]

dm_grn_mid_early_VC <- dm_subset_mid_early[which(dm_subset_mid_early$gene %in% grn_targets$V1),]


dm_early_forVmid_grn <- ang.vec.alph(dm_grn_for_early_VC$estimate_log2, dm_grn_mid_early_VC$estimate_log2)

# lengths don't match again, need to figure out a way to fix this

#dp_subset_for_early_temp <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_subset_mid_early$gene)]

dm_early_forVmid_random_grn <- t(replicate(10000,
RandomVectorSampler(
  vec1 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
  vec2 = dm_subset_mid_early$estimate_log2,
  sig_vec = dm_grn_for_early_VC$estimate_log2)))

#hist(dm_early_forVmid_random_grn[,1], breaks = 50)

dm_early_for_random_quants_grn <- quantile(dm_early_forVmid_random_grn[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
dm_early_for_random_quants_alpha_grn <- quantile(dm_early_forVmid_random_grn[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

#

plotting_dm_early_for_grn <- as.data.frame(t(c(dm_early_forVmid_grn,dm_early_for_random_quants_grn,dm_early_for_random_quants_alpha_grn,"D. melanogaster","Early")))

#



# plot foreleg vs. midleg at both stages

temp <- as.data.frame(rbind(plotting_VC_dp_late_forVmid_grn,plotting_VC_dp_early_forVmid_grn,plotting_VC_dc_late_forVmid_grn,plotting_dc_early_for_grn,plotting_VC_dm_late_forVmid_grn,plotting_dm_early_for_grn))

colnames(temp) <- c("VC","Vangle","Alpha","alpha_c","ED","VC_LCL","VC_UCL","Alpha_LCL","Alpha_UCL","species","stage")

temp[1:9] <- sapply(temp[1:9], as.numeric)

for_mid_VC <- ggplot(temp, aes(x = stage, y = VC)) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~species) +
  ylim(-1,1) +
  ylab("Foreleg to Midleg \nVector Correlation") +
  xlab("Developmental Stage") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = VC_LCL, ymax = VC_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  xlab(NULL) +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

for_mid_mag <- ggplot(temp, aes(x = stage, y = Alpha)) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~species) +
  ylab("Change in vector magnitude\n(foreleg/midleg)") +
  xlab("Developmental Stage") +
  #ylim(0,1) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = Alpha_LCL, ymax = Alpha_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

(for_mid_VC)/(for_mid_mag)

```

```{r}
dp_grn <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% grn_targets$V1)]

dc_grn <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% dp_grn$gene)]

dp_grn <- dp_grn[dp_grn$gene %in% dc_grn$gene]

grn_dpdc_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dp_grn$estimate_log2, dc_grn$estimate_log2)

grn_dpdc_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dp_grn$estimate_log2)))

grn_dpdc_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(grn_dpdc_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))
grn_dpdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(grn_dpdc_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdc_grn_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(grn_dpdc_for_late,grn_dpdc_for_late_random_quants,grn_dpdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. carrolli","Late")))

dp_grn <- dp_subset_for_late[which(dp_subset_for_late$gene %in% grn_targets$V1)]

dm_grn <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% dp_grn$gene)]

dp_grn <- dp_grn[dp_grn$gene %in% dm_grn$gene]

grn_dpdm_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dp_grn$estimate_log2, dm_grn$estimate_log2)

grn_dpdm_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dp_grn$estimate_log2)))

grn_dpdm_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(grn_dpdm_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

grn_dpdm_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(grn_dpdm_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdm_grn_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(grn_dpdm_for_late,grn_dpdm_for_late_random_quants,grn_dpdm_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. melanogaster","Late")))

dp_grn <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% grn_targets$V1)]

dc_grn <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_grn$gene)]

dp_grn <- dp_grn[dp_grn$gene %in% dc_grn$gene]

grn_dpdc_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dp_grn$estimate_log2, dc_grn$estimate_log2)

grn_dpdc_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dp_grn$estimate_log2)))

grn_dpdc_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(grn_dpdc_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

grn_dpdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(grn_dpdc_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdc_grn_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(grn_dpdc_for_early,grn_dpdc_for_early_random_quants,grn_dpdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. carrolli","Early")))

dp_grn <- dp_subset_for_early[which(dp_subset_for_early$gene %in% grn_targets$V1)]

dm_grn <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% dp_grn$gene)]

dp_grn <- dp_grn[dp_grn$gene %in% dm_grn$gene]

grn_dpdm_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dp_grn$estimate_log2, dm_grn$estimate_log2)

grn_dpdm_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dp_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dp_grn$estimate_log2)))

grn_dpdm_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(grn_dpdm_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

grn_dpdm_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(grn_dpdm_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dpdm_grn_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(grn_dpdm_for_early,grn_dpdm_for_early_random_quants,grn_dpdm_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. prolongata /\nD. melanogaster","Early")))


dm_grn <- dm_subset_for_early[which(dm_subset_for_early$gene %in% grn_targets$V1)]

dc_grn <- dc_subset_for_early[which(dc_subset_for_early$gene %in% dm_grn$gene)]

grn_dmdc_for_early <- ang.vec.alph(dm_grn$estimate_log2, dc_grn$estimate_log2)

grn_dmdc_for_early_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                         RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dm_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             vec2 = dc_subset_for_early$estimate_log2,
                                                             sig_vec = dm_grn$estimate_log2)))

grn_dmdc_for_early_random_quants <- quantile(grn_dmdc_for_early_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

grn_dmdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(grn_dmdc_for_early_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dmdc_grn_for_early <- as.data.table(t(c(grn_dmdc_for_early,grn_dmdc_for_early_random_quants,grn_dmdc_for_early_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli /\nD. melanogaster","Early")))

dm_grn <- dm_subset_for_late[which(dm_subset_for_late$gene %in% grn_targets$V1)]

dc_grn <- dc_subset_for_late[which(dc_subset_for_late$gene %in% dm_grn$gene)]

grn_dmdc_for_late <- ang.vec.alph(dm_grn$estimate_log2, dc_grn$estimate_log2)

grn_dmdc_for_late_random <- t(replicate(10000,
                                        RandomVectorSampler(vec1 = dc_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            vec2 = dm_subset_for_late$estimate_log2,
                                                            sig_vec = dm_grn$estimate_log2)))

grn_dmdc_for_late_random_quants <- quantile(grn_dmdc_for_late_random[,1] , c(0.025,0.975))

grn_dmdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha <- quantile(grn_dmdc_for_late_random[,4] , c(0.025,0.975))

plotting_dmdc_grn_for_late <- as.data.table(t(c(grn_dmdc_for_late,grn_dmdc_for_late_random_quants,grn_dmdc_for_late_random_quants_alpha,"D. carrolli /\nD. melanogaster","Late")))

plotting_species_grn <- as.data.frame(rbind(plotting_dpdc_grn_for_early,plotting_dpdc_grn_for_late,plotting_dpdm_grn_for_early,plotting_dpdm_grn_for_late,plotting_dmdc_grn_for_early,plotting_dmdc_grn_for_late))

colnames(plotting_species_grn) <- c("VC","Vangle","Alpha","Alpha_c","ED","VC_LCL","VC_UCL","Alpha_LCL","Alpha_UCL","Comparison","stage")

plotting_species_grn[1:9] <- lapply(plotting_species_grn[1:9], as.numeric)

grn_VC_spc <- ggplot(plotting_species_grn, aes(x = stage, y = VC)) +
  facet_wrap(~Comparison) +
  ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = VC_LCL, ymax = VC_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Foreleg\nvector correlation") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  xlab(NULL) +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

grn_Mag_spc <- ggplot(plotting_species_grn, aes(x = stage, y = Alpha_c)) +
  facet_wrap(~Comparison) +
  #ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=0.5,vjust=0.5)) +
  geom_crossbar(aes(ymin = Alpha_LCL, ymax = Alpha_UCL), colour = "black", fill = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Change in foreleg\nvector magnitude") +
  xlab("Developmental stage") +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

(grn_VC_spc)/(grn_Mag_spc)

```
